details.description: Rufus T. Firefly is named president/dictator of bankrupt Freedonia and declares war on neighboring Sylvania over the love of wealthy Mrs. Teasdale.

title: Dumb & Dumber
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Road Comedies

details.title: Dumb & Dumber
details.description: 20 years since their first adventure, Lloyd and Harry go on a road trip to find Harry's newly discovered daughter, who was given up for adoption.

title: Dumbo
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy, Comedy & Classic > Fantasy Classics

details.title: Dumbo
details.description: Dumbo is a baby elephant born with over-sized ears and a supreme lack of confidence. But thanks to his even more diminutive buddy Timothy the Mouse,  the pint-sized pachyderm learns to surmount all obstacles.

title: Dunston Checks In
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Slapstick Escapades

details.title: Dunston Checks In
details.description: Hotel manager Robert Grant is forced by his boss to postpone his family vacation when a hotel critic checks in. Trouble is, the critic is really a villainous jewel thief with an orangutan assistant named Dunston. When Dunston gets loose and tries to escape a life of crime -- aided by Robert's sons -- havoc, hijinks and lots of laughs abound!

title: Duoluo tianshi
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Martial Arts & Comedy > Hong Kong Actioners

details.title: Duoluo tianshi
details.description: The ever-so-smooth Killer, a gun-for-hire, resigns from his job when he starts feeling the growing pressure from his beautiful boss, Agent, about his whereabouts. The real problem at-hand, however, is that both parties are falling in love with each other; and neither the cunning Killer, nor the ruthless Agent can deal with the reality of their situation.

title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
details.description: An alien is left behind on Earth and saved by the 10-year-old Elliott who decides to keep him hidden in his home. While a task force hunts for the extra-terrestrial, Elliott, his brother, and his little sister Gertie form an emotional bond with their new friend, and try to help him find his way home.

title: East of Eden
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Formative Years Portraits

details.title: East of Eden
details.description: In the Salinas Valley in and around World War I, Cal Trask feels he must compete against overwhelming odds with his brother for the love of their father. Cal is frustrated at every turn, from his reaction to the war, how to get ahead in business and in life, and how to relate to his estranged mother.

title: Eat Drink Man Woman
full_path: Heartfelt Stories & Cultural Delights > Tibetan Romance, Comedy & Drama > Tibetan Dramas

details.title: Eat Drink Man Woman
details.description: Retired and widowed Chinese master chef Chu lives in modern day Taipei, with his three attractive daughters, all of whom are unattached. Soon, each daughter encounters a new man in their lives. When these new relationships blossom, stereotypes are broken and the living situation within the family changes.

title: Ed
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Sports Comedies

details.title: Ed
details.description: Jack Cooper could be a world-class baseball pitcher if he didn't keep buckling under the pressure. He tries to keep his spirits up after he's traded to a minor league team but loses all hope when he discovers that Ed, one of his teammates, is a chimp. Ed used to be the team mascot, but was promoted to third base when the owners realized he had a talent for baseball. As Jack struggles to get used to his new surroundings, Ed helps him regain his confidence on and off the field.

title: Ed Wood
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Quirky Dramedies

details.title: Ed Wood
details.description: The mostly true story of the legendary "worst director of all time", who, with the help of his strange friends, filmed countless B-movies without ever becoming famous or successful.

title: Eddie
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Sports Drama & Coming-Of-Age > Underdog Sports Dramas

details.title: Eddie
details.description: Eddie is a New York limo driver and a fanatical follower of the New York Knicks professional basketball team. The team is struggling with a mediocre record when, in mid-season, "Wild Bill" Burgess, the new owner, as a public relations gimmick, stages an 'honorary coach' contest, which Eddie wins. The fans love it, so "Wild Bill" fires the coach and hires her. She takes the bunch of overpaid prima

title: Emma
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Romances

details.title: Emma
details.description: Emma Woodhouse is a congenial young lady who delights in meddling in other people’s affairs. She is perpetually trying to unite men and women who are utterly wrong for each other. Despite her interest in romance, Emma is clueless about her own feelings, and her relationship with gentle Mr. Knightley.

title: Enchanted April
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Quirky Encounters

details.title: Enchanted April
details.description: When married British women Rose Arbuthnot and Lottie Wilkins decide to take a break from their respective spouses, they stay at a castle in Italy for a quiet holiday. Joining the ladies is Caroline Dester, a young socialite, and Mrs. Fisher, an older aristocrat. Liberated from their daily routines, the four women ease into life in rural Italy, and each finds herself transformed by the experience.

title: Enfer, L'
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Entanglements

details.title: Enfer, L'
details.description: Forced to work extremely hard to keep things afloat, Paul begins hearing voices in his head questioning his past choices. Convinced that his wife has been unfaithful, he begins to see every male guest as a potential threat. What follows is Paul's downward spiral into the madness of deranged jealousy where he finally discovers that hell is not a state of mind – hell is himself.

title: Entertaining Angels: The Dorothy Day Story
full_path: Reality, Documentary & Social Commentary > Biography, Drama & Religion > Saint Biographies

details.title: Entertaining Angels: The Dorothy Day Story
details.description: The firebrand reporter, feminist and philanthropist Dorothy Day co-founds The Catholic Worker with Peter Maurin, an eccentric philosopher.

title: Eraser
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: Eraser
details.description: A Witness Protection specialist becomes suspicious of his co-workers when dealing with a case involving high-tech weapons.

title: Escape from L.A.
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Survival Films

details.title: Escape from L.A.
details.description: Into the 9.6-quaked Los Angeles of 2013 comes Snake Plissken. His job: wade through L.A.'s ruined landmarks to retrieve a doomsday device.

title: Escape from New York
full_path: Science, Space & Futuristic Frontiers > Sci-Fi, Action & Dystopian > Dystopian Futures

details.title: Escape from New York
details.description: In a world ravaged by crime, the entire island of Manhattan has been converted into a walled prison where brutal prisoners roam free. After the US president crash-lands inside, war hero Snake Plissken has 24 hours to bring him back.

title: Escape to Witch Mountain
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Orphaned Odysseys

details.title: Escape to Witch Mountain
details.description: The tale of two orphan twins with special powers who go looking for their origins. The two are hindered by an avaricious tycoon who only wants to exploit their abilities.

title: Eve's Bayou
full_path: Drama, Family & Social Heritage > Southern Gothic & Family Drama > Poverty Dramas

details.title: Eve's Bayou
details.description: Summer heats up in rural Louisiana beside Eve’s Bayou, 1962, as the Batiste family tries to survive the secrets they’ve kept and the betrayals they’ve endured.

title: Even Cowgirls Get the Blues
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Quirky Dramedies

details.title: Even Cowgirls Get the Blues
details.description: A girl born with enormous thumbs in the repressive era of the 1950s learns to turn her quirks into assets.

title: Event Horizon
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: Event Horizon
details.description: In 2047, a group of astronauts are sent to investigate and salvage the starship Event Horizon which disappeared mysteriously seven years before on its maiden voyage. However, it soon becomes evident that something sinister resides in its corridors.

title: Everest
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Survival Films

details.title: Everest
details.description: Inspired by the incredible events surrounding a treacherous attempt to reach the summit of the world's highest mountain, "Everest" documents the awe-inspiring journey of two different expeditions challenged beyond their limits by one of the fiercest snowstorms ever encountered by mankind. Their mettle tested by the harshest of elements found on the planet, the climbers will face nearly impossible obstacles as a lifelong obsession becomes a breathtaking struggle for survival.

title: Everyone Says I Love You
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Quirky Encounters

details.title: Everyone Says I Love You
details.description: A New York girl sets her father up with a beautiful woman in a shaky marriage while her half sister gets engaged.

title: Evil Dead II
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy Horror Comedies & Adventure > Campy Horror Comedies

details.title: Evil Dead II
details.description: Ash Williams and his girlfriend Linda find a log cabin in the woods with a voice recording from an archeologist who had recorded himself reciting ancient chants from "The Book of the Dead." As they play the recording an evil power is unleashed taking over Linda's body.

title: Evita
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Artistic Visionaries

details.title: Evita
details.description: The hit musical based on the life of Evita Duarte, an Argentinian actress who eventually became the wife of Argentinian president Juan Perón, and the most beloved and hated woman in Argentina.

title: Excess Baggage
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Dark Comedies

details.title: Excess Baggage
details.description: A rich brat fakes her own kidnapping, but in the process ends up locked in the trunk of a car that gets stolen.

title: Executive Decision
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Thrillers

details.title: Executive Decision
details.description: Terrorists hijack a 747 inbound to Washington D.C., demanding the release of their imprisoned leader. Intelligence expert David Grant (Kurt Russell) suspects another reason and he is soon the reluctant member of a special assault team that is assigned to intercept the plane and hijackers.

title: Exit to Eden
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Social Climbers

details.title: Exit to Eden
details.description: Photographer Elliot Slater has inadvertently snapped the only existing photos of elusive jewel thief Omar. When Elliot leaves for a private vacation on an S&M island, he is followed by Omar, Omar's partner, Nina, and undercover police officers Fred and Sheila. Unaware of the number of people chasing him, Elliot enjoys his stay at the resort, and finds himself falling in love with head dominatrix Lisa.

title: Exotica
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Urban Seductions

details.title: Exotica
details.description: In the upscale Toronto strip club Exotica, dancer Christina is visited nightly by the obsessive Francis, a depressed tax auditor. Her ex-boyfriend, the club's MC, Eric, still jealously pines for her even as he introduces her onstage, but Eric is having his own relationship problems with the club's female owner. Thomas, a mysterious pet-shop owner, is about to become unexpectedly involved in their lives.

title: Extreme Measures
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > New York Thrillers

details.title: Extreme Measures
details.description: Guy Luthan, a British doctor working at a hospital in New York, starts making unwelcome enquiries when the body of a man who died in his emergency room disappears. After the trail leads Luthan to the door of an eminent surgeon at the hospital, Luthan soon finds himself in extreme danger people who want the hospital's secret to remain undiscovered.

title: Eye for an Eye
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Desperate Pursuits

details.title: Eye for an Eye
details.description: Mario, an exemplary man, lives in a village on the Galician coast. In the old people’s home, where he works as a nurse, everyone appreciates him. When the best known narco in the area, Antonio Padín, recently released from prison, enters the residence, Mario tries to make Antonio feel at home.  Now, Padín's two sons, Kike and Toño, are in charge of the family business. The failure of an operation will put Kike in jail and cause them to owe a large debt to a Colombian supplier. Toño will turn to the nurse to try to convince his father to assume the debt. But Mario has his own plans.

title: Face/Off
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Identity Thrillers

details.title: Face/Off
details.description: In order to foil a terrorist plot, an FBI agent undergoes facial transplant surgery and assumes the identity of a criminal mastermind. The plan turns sour when the criminal wakes up prematurely and seeks revenge.

title: Fair Game
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Assassination Thrillers

details.title: Fair Game
details.description: Max Kirkpatrick is a cop who protects Kate McQuean, a civil law attorney, from a renegade KGB team out to terminate her

title: FairyTale: A True Story
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy, Comedy & Classic > Fantasy Classics

details.title: FairyTale: A True Story
details.description: In 1917, two children take a photograph, which is soon believed by some to be the first scientific evidence of the existence of fairies. Based on the true story of the Cottingley Fairies.

title: Faithful
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Romance, Comedy & Drama > Silent Romances

details.title: Faithful
details.description: Adonese is returning home from seeing the woman he is courting, and he is driving around a corner when his car accidentally brushes against the tramp 'Faithful' and knocks him over. Feeling sorry for him, Adonese helps him up and buys him a new suit of clothes. The naively innocent Faithful reads too much into this gesture, and he begins to follow his benefactor everywhere, expecting to receive future gifts.

title: Fall
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Desperate Pursuits

details.title: Fall
details.description: For best friends Becky and Hunter, life is all about conquering fears and pushing limits. But after they climb 2,000 feet to the top of a remote, abandoned radio tower, they find themselves stranded with no way down. Now Becky and Hunter’s expert climbing skills will be put to the ultimate test as they desperately fight to survive the elements, a lack of supplies, and vertigo-inducing heights

title: Fallen
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Fantasy Romance & Vampire Fiction > Forbidden Romances

details.title: Fallen
details.description: Lucinda Price is sent to a reform academy under the assumption that she has killed a boy. There, she meets two mysterious boys, Cam and Daniel, to whom she feels drawn to both. But as the love triangle unfurls, it is Daniel that Luce cannot keep herself away from, and things begin to take a darker turn when she finds out his true identity.

title: Family Thing, A
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Small Town Dramas > Personal Journeys

details.title: Family Thing, A
details.description: Earl Pilcher Jr. runs an equipment rental outfit in Arkansas, lives with his wife and kids and parents, and rarely takes off his gimme cap. His mother dies, leaving a letter explaining he's not her natural son, but the son of a Black woman who died in childbirth; plus, he has a half brother Ray, in Chicago, she wants him to visit. Earl makes the trip, initially receiving a cold welcome from Ray and Ray's son, Virgil. His birth mother's sister, Aunt T., an aged and blind matriarch, takes Earl in tow and insists that the family open up to him.

title: Fantasia
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy, Comedy & Classic > Fantasy Classics

details.title: Fantasia
details.description: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.

title: Far From Home: The Adventures of Yellow Dog
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Wilderness Adventures

details.title: Far From Home: The Adventures of Yellow Dog
details.description: Teenager Angus adopts a stray dog and names him Yellow. Several days later, while travelling along the coast of British Columbia with Angus's father, John, the boy and dog become stranded when turbulent waters capsize their boat. Angus's parents relentlessly badger rescue teams. Angus, schooled by his father in wilderness survival skills, and assisted by the intelligent Yellow Dog, tries to attract rescuers.

title: Farewell My Concubine
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Melodramas

details.title: Farewell My Concubine
details.description: Two boys meet at an opera training school in Peking in 1924. Their resulting friendship will span nearly 70 years and endure some of the most troublesome times in China's history.

title: Farewell to Arms, A
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > War Romances & Classic Dramas > War Romances

details.title: Farewell to Arms, A
details.description: A tale of the World War I love affair, begun in Italy, between American ambulance driver Lt. Frederic Henry and British nurse Catherine Barkley. Eventually separated by Frederic's transfer, tremendous challenges and difficult decisions face each as the war rages on.

title: Fargo
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Small Town Thrillers

details.title: Fargo
details.description: Jerry, a small-town Minnesota car salesman is bursting at the seams with debt... but he's got a plan. He's going to hire two thugs to kidnap his wife in a scheme to collect a hefty ransom from his wealthy father-in-law. It's going to be a snap and nobody's going to get hurt... until people start dying. Enter Police Chief Marge, a coffee-drinking, parka-wearing - and extremely pregnant - investigator who'll stop at nothing to get her man. And if you think her small-time investigative skills will give the crooks a run for their ransom... you betcha!

title: Farinelli: il castrato
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Composer Biopics

details.title: Farinelli: il castrato
details.description: The life and career of Italian opera singer Farinelli, considered one of the greatest castrato singers of all time.

title: Farmer & Chase
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > New York Thrillers

details.title: Farmer & Chase
details.description: A career thief forms a partnership with his reluctant son.

title: Fast, Cheap & Out of Control
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Quirky Dramedies

details.title: Fast, Cheap & Out of Control
details.description: Errol Morris’s Fast, Cheap & Out of Control interweaves the stories of four men, each driven to create eccentric worlds from their unique obsessions, all of which involve animals. There’s a lion tamer who shares his theories on the mental processes of wild animals; a topiary gardener who has devoted a lifetime to shaping bears and giraffes out of hedges and trees; a man fascinated with hairless mole rats; and an MIT scientist who has designed complex, autonomous robots that can crawl like bugs.

title: Faster Pussycat! Kill! Kill!
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy Horror Comedies & Adventure > Campy Horror Comedies

details.title: Faster Pussycat! Kill! Kill!
details.description: A trio of thrill-seeking go-go dancers kidnap a young girl and attempt to seduce an old rancher and his two sons out of their small fortune, but their scheme doesn't play out as intended.

title: Fatal Instinct
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Betrayals & Deceptions

details.title: Fatal Instinct
details.description: A police detective follows a trail of evidence that eventually seems to lead to his trusted partner's ex-con brother who he helped put in prison years ago.

title: Father of the Bride
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Wacky Family Misadventures

details.title: Father of the Bride
details.description: George Banks is an ordinary, middle-class man whose 22 year-old daughter Annie has decided to marry a man from an upper-class family, but George can't think of what life would be like without his daughter. His wife tries to make him happy for Annie, but when the wedding takes place at their home and a foreign wedding planner takes over the ceremony, he becomes slightly insane.

title: Father of the Bride Part II
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Wacky Family Misadventures

details.title: Father of the Bride Part II
details.description: Just when George Banks has recovered from his daughter's wedding, he receives the news that she's pregnant ... and that George's wife is expecting too. He was planning on selling their home, but that's a plan that—like George—will have to change with the arrival of both a grandchild and a kid of his own.

title: Fathers' Day
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Wacky Family Misadventures

details.title: Fathers' Day
details.description: A woman cons two old boyfriends into searching for her runaway son by convincing both that they are the boy's father.

title: Faust
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Romance, Drama & Fantasy > Gothic Romances

details.title: Faust
details.description: A doctor in early 19th-century Germany becomes infatuated with the sister of a man he unintentionally killed and bargains with the Devil incarnate to conjure their union in exchange for his soul.

title: Fear
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Twisted Romances

details.title: Fear
details.description: Nicole Walker always dreamed of being swept away by someone special — someone strong, sexy and sensitive who would care for her more than anything else in the world. David is all that and more: a modern-day knight who charms and seduces her, body and soul. But her perfect boyfriend is not all he seems to be. His sweet facade masks a savage, dark side that will soon transform Nicole's dream into a nightmare.

title: Fear of a Black Hat
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Music & Mockumentary > Mockumentaries

details.title: Fear of a Black Hat
details.description: Chronicling the controversial career of bad boys N.W.H. (Niggaz With Hats), this uproarious 'mockumentary' lampoons all of hardcore rap's hot-button issues. This underground laugh riot recounts the rise, fall and resurrection of a clueless bunch of would-be rappers, Ice Cold, Tone-Def & Tasty Taste performing as N.W.H.

title: Fearless
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Redemption Dramas > Haunted Past Redeemers

details.title: Fearless
details.description: After surviving a plane crash that kills many others, Max Klein develops a sense of invulnerability, leading to radical, compulsive actions. Can a psychologist and a fellow guilt-ridden survivor bring him down to earth?

title: Feast of July
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Romance, Drama & Fantasy > Gothic Romances

details.title: Feast of July
details.description: After an abandoned young woman in late 19th Century England is taken in by a rural couple with three handsome sons, tragic consequences result.

title: Feeling Minnesota
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Twisted Romances

details.title: Feeling Minnesota
details.description: Sam Clayton's marriage to ex-stripper Freddie comes about when she's strong-armed into the match by Red, a club proprietor who once did her a favor. But Freddie falls in love with Jjaks, Sam's brother, and the pair tries to escape the situation together. It isn't long before both Sam and Red catch up with them, resulting in threats against the two of them -- although tension also starts to build between Sam and Red.

title: Female Perversions
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Mind Games Manipulations

details.title: Female Perversions
details.description: Eve Stephens, a beautiful and sexy high-powered attorney, is up for appointment as a judge. But below her veneer of self-confidence lies a darker side, one in which she is driven by bizarre visions and sexual fantasies. After a series of events, including rescuing her sister Madelyn after her arrest for shoplifting, being rejected by her lover John during a surprise visit, and finally, meeting with the Governor regarding her judicial appointment, Eve comes unraveled. In a stunning and climactic conclusion, Eve is forced to confront her fears and, more importantly, herself.

title: Field of Dreams
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Sports Comedies

details.title: Field of Dreams
details.description: Ray Kinsella is an Iowa farmer who hears a mysterious voice telling him to turn his cornfield into a baseball diamond. He does, but the voice's directions don't stop -- even after the spirits of deceased ballplayers turn up to play.

title: Fierce Creatures
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Offbeat Satires

details.title: Fierce Creatures
details.description: Ex-policeman Rollo Lee is sent to run Marwood Zoo, the newly acquired business of a New Zealand tycoon. In order to meet high profit targets and keep the zoo open, Rollo enforces a new 'fierce creatures' policy, whereby only the most impressive and dangerous animals are allowed to remain in the zoo. However, the keepers are less enthusiastic about complying with these demands.

title: Fire Down Below
full_path: Drama, Justice & Social Commentary > Classic Drama & Social Justice > Classic Tragedies

details.title: Fire Down Below
details.description: Tony and Felix own a tramp boat, and sail around the Caribbean doing odd jobs and drinking a lot. They agree to ferry the beautiful but passportless Irena to another island. They both fall for her, leading to betrayal and a break-up of their partnership. Tony takes a job on a cargo ship. After a collision he finds himself trapped below deck with time running out (the ship is aflame), and only Felix, whom he hates and has sworn to kill, left to save him.

title: Firestorm
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Thrillers

details.title: Firestorm
details.description: Firefighter Jesse Graves has to save ornithologist Jennifer and other people caught in a forest fire, which was set up by the lawyer of convicted killer Earl Shaye, who escaped from the prison with several of his inmates posing as firefighters to recover $37,000,000 in stashed loot.

title: First Kid
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Quarter Life Crises

details.title: First Kid
details.description: Some say that to be the leader of a country is one of the loneliest jobs in the world. But being the child of a world leader can be doubly so. Constantly surrounded by security officers, restricted in movements and having almost every waking moment carefully monitored makes normalcy an impossibility. No one knows this better than young Luke Davenport, the son of U.S. President Davenport. He vents his loneliness, frustration and feelings of isolation from family and friends by being a brat to his private Secret Service agent. When the agent snaps from the strain in front of the First Lady, a new agent is assigned to Luke. He turns out to be the enormous Sam Simms, a bit of a rogue who managed to rise through the ranks by sheer determination rather than strict adherence to Secret-Service protocol. At first, Luke tries all his old tricks upon Sam. But instead of getting angry, Sam seems to actually understand.

title: First Knight
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Medieval Adventures

details.title: First Knight
details.description: The timeless tale of King Arthur and the legend of Camelot are retold in this passionate period drama. Arthur is reluctant to hand the crown to Lancelot, and Guinevere is torn between her loyalty to her husband and her growing love for his rival. But Lancelot must balance his loyalty to the throne with the rewards of true love.

title: Fish Called Wanda, A
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Hostage Capers

details.title: Fish Called Wanda, A
details.description: While a diamond advocate attempts to steal a collection of diamonds, troubles arise when he realises he’s not the only one after the collection.

title: Fled
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Martial Arts & Comedy > Buddy Actioners

details.title: Fled
details.description: During a routine prison work detail, convict Piper is chained to Dodge, a cyberhacker, when gunfire breaks out. Apparently, the attack is related to stolen money that the Mafia is after, and some computer files that somebody wants desperately to bury. The pair, who don't exactly enjoy each other's company, escape and must work together if they are to reach Atlanta alive. Luckily, they meet a woman who may be willing to help them.

title: Flesh and Bone
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Twisted Romances

details.title: Flesh and Bone
details.description: Haunted by memories of his father murdering a family, Arlis Sweeney prefers to keep to himself, focusing his energy on his work. One day, the traumatic past that eats away at him returns when he meets Kay Davies, a woman connected to the bloody event. Against all odds, Arlis and Kay fall in love; however, when his father, Roy, reappears in his life -- with the coldhearted Ginnie in tow -- Arlis must deal with his past demons.

title: Flipper
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Wildlife Rescues

details.title: Flipper
details.description: Sandy Ricks is sent by his mom to Coral Key, a rustic island in the Florida keys, to spend the summer with his uncle Porter Ricks. Sandy dislikes everything about his new environment until a new friend comes into his life, a dolphin named Flipper, that brings uncle and nephew together and leads Sandy on the summer adventure of a lifetime.

title: Flirt
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Crises

details.title: Flirt
details.description: The same situation is played out in different cities (New York, Berlin and Tokyo). A lover has to choose whether to commit to a partner who is returning home. In each case there are other people involved, an ex-partner and someone else in a "permanent" relationship, what do they choose to do?

title: Flirting With Disaster
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Road Comedies

details.title: Flirting With Disaster
details.description: Adopted as a child, new father Mel Colpin decides he cannot name his son until he knows his birth parents, and determines to make a cross-country quest to find them. Accompanied by his wife, Nancy, and an inept yet gorgeous adoption agent, Tina, he departs on an epic road trip that quickly devolves into a farce of mistaken identities, wrong turns, and overzealous and love-struck ATF agents.

title: Flubber
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Lighthearted Escapades

details.title: Flubber
details.description: Professor Phillip Brainard, an absent minded professor, works with his assistant Weebo, trying to create a substance that's a new source of energy and that will save Medfield College where his sweetheart Sara is the president. He has missed his wedding twice, and on the afternoon of his third wedding, Professor Brainard creates flubber, which allows objects to fly through the air.

title: Fluke
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Uplifting Dramedies

details.title: Fluke
details.description: Workaholic Thomas Johnson dies in an auto accident and reincarnates as a dog. Remembering some of his previous being, he returns to his wife and son to protect them from the man who caused his accident. But, as time goes by, his memories return, and Thomas realizes he wasn't such a good husband and father.

title: Fly Away Home
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Wilderness Adventures

details.title: Fly Away Home
details.description: Amy is only 13 years old when her mother is killed. She goes to Canada to live with her father, an eccentric inventor whom she barely knows. Amy is miserable in her new life... until she discovers a nest of goose eggs that were abandoned when a local forest was torn down. The eggs hatch and Amy becomes "Mama Goose". When winter comes, Amy and her dad must find a way to lead the birds South.

title: Fools Rush In
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Comedy & Adventure > Macau Thrillers

details.title: Fools Rush In
details.description: Wu Renyao, who is good at motorcycle stunts, meets his father Wu Renteng, whom he has not seen for many years, and embarks on a road trip to the big city along with a girl named Huan Song and her brother's motorcade.

title: For Ever Mozart
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: For Ever Mozart
details.description: Episodic film that follows a theater troupe from France attempting to put on a play in Sarajevo. Along their journey they are captured and held in a POW camp, and they call for help from their friends and relations in France.

title: For Love or Money
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Quirky Encounters

details.title: For Love or Money
details.description: New York concierge Doug Ireland wants to go into business for himself and refurbish a hotel on Roosevelt Island, N.Y., but he needs an investor. With a few weeks left before his option on the site runs out, Doug agrees to help wealthy Christian Hanover conceal his affair with salesgirl Andy Hart from his wife. Despite his own attraction to Andy, Doug tries to stay focused on getting Christian to invest $3 million in his project.

title: For Richer or Poorer
full_path: Comedy, Adventure & Cultural Odyssey > Comedy & Adventure Films > Fish Out Of Water Comedies > Cultural Transplants

details.title: For Richer or Poorer
details.description: Brad Sexton and his wife, Caroline, are wealthy New Yorkers with both marital and financial problems. The latter issue becomes a pressing matter when they discover that their accountant has embezzled millions and pinned the blame on them. Forced to go on the lam, Brad and Caroline end up in an Amish area of Pennsylvania and decide to pose as members of the religious group to evade the IRS. As the two adapt to the simple Amish lifestyle, they begin to reconnect.

title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > War-Torn Romances

details.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
details.description: During the Spanish Civil War, an American allied with the Republicans finds romance during a desperate mission to blow up a strategically important bridge.

title: For the Moment
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > War Romances & Classic Dramas > War Romances

details.title: For the Moment
details.description: This Canadian film presents and old-fashioned war time romance.  It is set during 1942 in Manitoba and traces the doomed affair between a young farmer's wife (Christianne Hirt) whose husband is fighting abroad and a dashing Australian pilot (Russell Crowe).  The pilot has come to train in the British Commonwealth Air Training Plan of Canada.  When the pilot, Lachlan, is not training, he is surreptitiously wooing Lill, the farmer's wife.  At the other end of town, Betsy (Wanda Cannon) who supports her two kids by bootlegging, charges for her services.  She gets involved with Zeek (Scott Kraft), an American flight instructor.

title: Forbidden Planet
full_path: Darkness, Fear & Human Conflict > Thriller & Survival Dramas > Survival Thrillers

details.title: Forbidden Planet
details.description: Starship C57D travels to planet Altair 4 in search of the crew of spaceship "Bellerophon," a scientific expedition that has been missing for twenty years. They find themselves unwelcome by the expedition's lone survivor and warned of destruction by an invisible force if they don't turn back immediately.

title: Foreign Correspondent
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Murder Investigations

details.title: Foreign Correspondent
details.description: American crime reporter John Jones is reassigned to Europe as a foreign correspondent to cover the imminent war. When he walks into the middle of an assassination and stumbles on a spy ring, he seeks help from a beautiful politician’s daughter and an urbane English journalist to uncover the truth.

title: Forget Paris
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Quirky Encounters

details.title: Forget Paris
details.description: Mickey Gordon is a basketball referee who travels to France to bury his father. Ellen Andrews is an American living in Paris who works for the airline he flies on. They meet and fall in love, but their relationship goes through many difficult patches.

title: Forrest Gump
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Uplifting Journeys

details.title: Forrest Gump
details.description: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.

title: Four Days in September
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: Four Days in September
details.description: Fernando, a journalist, and his friend César join terrorist group MR8 in order to fight Brazilian dictatorial regime during the late sixties. César, however, is wounded and captured during a bank hold up. Fernando then decides to kidnap the American ambassador in Brazil and ask for the release of fifteen political prisoners in exchange for his life.

title: Four Rooms
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Offbeat Satires

details.title: Four Rooms
details.description: It's Ted the Bellhop's first night on the job...and the hotel's very unusual guests are about to place him in some outrageous predicaments. It seems that this evening's room service is serving up one unbelievable happening after another.

title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Uplifting Dramedies

details.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
details.description: Over the course of five social occasions, a committed bachelor must consider the notion that he may have discovered love.

title: Foxfire
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Comedy, Coming-Of-Age & Romance > Teen Comedies

details.title: Foxfire
details.description: Set in the 1950s, a a group of young girls in upstate New York form their own gang.

title: Frankie Starlight
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Lgbtq+ Comedy Romances & Relationships > Quirky Romances

details.title: Frankie Starlight
details.description: The quirky story of a young boy's adventures growing up with his stunningly beautiful mother and the two very different men who love her.

title: Free Willy
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Wildlife Rescues

details.title: Free Willy
details.description: When maladjusted orphan Jesse vandalizes a theme park, he is placed with foster parents and must work at the park to make amends. There he meets Willy, a young Orca whale who has been separated from his family. Sensing kinship, they form a bond and, with the help of kindly whale trainer Rae Lindley, develop a routine of tricks. However, greedy park owner Dial soon catches wind of the duo and makes plans to profit from them.

title: Free Willy 2: The Adventure Home
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Wildlife Rescues

details.title: Free Willy 2: The Adventure Home
details.description: Jesse becomes reunited with Willy three years after the whale's jump to freedom as the teenager tries to rescue the killer whale and other orcas from an oil spill.

title: Free Willy 3: The Rescue
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Wildlife Rescues

details.title: Free Willy 3: The Rescue
details.description: Willy the whale is back, this time threatened by illegal whalers making money off sushi. Jesse, now 16, has taken a job on an orca-researching ship, along with old friend Randolph and a sarcastic scientist, Drew. On the whaler's ship is captain John Wesley and his son, Max, who isn't really pleased about his father's job, but doesn't have the gut to say so. Along the way, Willy reunites with Jesse.

title: Freeway
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Betrayals & Deceptions

details.title: Freeway
details.description: Following the arrest of her mother, Ramona, young Vanessa Lutz decides to go in search of her estranged grandmother. On the way, she is given a ride by school counselor Bob Wolverton. During the journey, Lutz begins to realize that Bob is the notorious I-5 Killer and manages to escape by shooting him several times. Wounded but still very much alive, Bob pursues Lutz across the state in this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood.

title: French Kiss
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Fateful Encounters

details.title: French Kiss
details.description: After her fiancee admits to infidelity while on a business trip in France, a woman attempts to get her lover back and marry him by traveling to Paris despite her crippling fear of flying.  On the way she unwittingly smuggles something of value that has a charming crook chasing her across France as she chases after her future husband.

title: French Twist (Gazon maudit)
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Entanglements

details.title: French Twist (Gazon maudit)
details.description: After learning of her husband's infidelities, a housewife invites an itinerant lesbian to move in with them. None of their lives will ever be the same again.

title: Fresh
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Lighthearted Escapades

details.title: Fresh
details.description: Frustrated by scrolling dating apps only to end up on lame, tedious dates, Noa takes a chance by giving her number to the awkwardly charming Steve after a produce-section meet-cute at the grocery store.

title: Friday
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Social Climbers

details.title: Friday
details.description: Craig and Smokey are two guys in Los Angeles hanging out on their porch on a Friday afternoon, smoking and drinking, looking for something to do.

title: Fried Green Tomatoes
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Small Town Dramas > Personal Journeys

details.title: Fried Green Tomatoes
details.description: Amidst her own personality crisis, a southern housewife meets an outgoing old woman who tells her the story of Idgie Threadgoode and Ruth Jamison, two young women who experienced hardships and love in 1920s Whistle Stop, Alabama.

title: Frisk
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Serial Killer Thrillers

details.title: Frisk
details.description: A first person narrative of the exploits of a gay serial killer in deeply disturbing, controversial drama about violence, sexuality, and the imagination. Dennis, the main character, whose lead we follow on this path between what is real and what we can only hope is surreal. His friends attempt to determine if he's truly a psychopath.

title: From Dusk Till Dawn
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
details.description: After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the Gecko brothers head south to a seedy Mexican bar to hide out in safety, unaware of its notorious vampire clientele.

title: Full Metal Jacket
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Formative Years Portraits

details.title: Full Metal Jacket
details.description: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the U.S.-Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue.

title: Full Speed
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Thriller, Crime & Deception > Deception Thrillers

details.title: Full Speed
details.description: German vehicle fanatic Dieter 'Didi' accepts to drive a truckload of waste barrels to a French dump site. Didi ignores the plant needs to dump toxic waste after a major incident, which made the international news. But while the French site exploiter's agent Marcel believes it's Did's load, that's in fact a deliberately obvious diversion. Now everyone chases everyone else.

title: Funny Face
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > European Escapades

details.title: Funny Face
details.description: A shy Greenwich Village book clerk is discovered by a fashion photographer and whisked off to Paris where she becomes a reluctant model.

title: Further Gesture, A
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Betrayals & Deceptions

details.title: Further Gesture, A
details.description: Dowd, an IRA prisoner in the H-blocks, is gloomily facing his sentence, until he joins a comrade in a risky escape. Dowd begins a new life in New York, but he might as well be in prison again - until he strikes up a friendship with co-worker Tulio and gets to know his close group of Guatemalan exiles.

title: G.I. Jane
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Military Drama & Action > Survival Dramas

details.title: G.I. Jane
details.description: In response to political pressure from Senator Lillian DeHaven, the U.S. Navy begins a program that would allow for the eventual integration of women into its combat services. The program begins with a single trial candidate, Lieutenant Jordan O'Neil, who is chosen specifically for her femininity. O'Neil enters the grueling Navy SEAL training program under the command of Master Chief John James Urgayle, who unfairly pushes O'Neil until her determination wins his respect.

title: Gabbeh
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: Gabbeh
details.description: An elderly couple go about their routine of cleaning their gabbeh, while bickering gently with each other. Magically, a young woman appears, helping the two clean the rug. This young woman belongs to the clan whose history is depicted in the design of the gabbeh, and the rug recounts the story of the courtship of the young woman by a stranger from the clan.

title: Gandhi
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > War Heroes & Legends

details.title: Gandhi
details.description: In the early years of the 20th century, Mohandas K. Gandhi, a British-trained lawyer, forsakes all worldly possessions to take up the cause of Indian independence. Faced with armed resistance from the British government, Gandhi adopts a policy of 'passive resistance', endeavouring to win freedom for his people without resorting to bloodshed.

title: Gang Related
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: Gang Related
details.description: After murdering an undercover DEA agent, two corrupt cops scramble to cover up what they've done.

title: Gaslight
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Mind Games Manipulations

details.title: Gaslight
details.description: A newlywed fears she's going mad when strange things start happening at the family mansion.

title: Gattaca
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Futuristic Uprisings

details.title: Gattaca
details.description: Vincent is an all-too-human man who dares to defy a system obsessed with genetic perfection. He is an "In-Valid" who assumes the identity of a member of the genetic elite to pursue his goal of traveling into space with the Gattaca Aerospace Corporation.

title: George of the Jungle
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Whimsical Escapades

details.title: George of the Jungle
details.description: Deep in the African jungle, a baby named George, the sole survivor of a plane crash, is raised by gorillas. George grows up to be a buff and lovable klutz who has a rainforest full of animal friends: Tookie, his big-beaked toucan messenger; Ape, a witty talking gorilla; and Shep, a peanut-loving pooch of an elephant. But when poachers mess with George's pals, the King of Swing swings into action.

title: Georgia
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Murder Investigations

details.title: Georgia
details.description: A young woman investigates the death of her mother, who drowned when her daughter was still a baby. The question is: was it murder, suicide or merely an accident?

title: Germinal
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Historical Dramas

details.title: Germinal
details.description: Dismissed from the railroads in 1863 for his union activities, Etienne Lantier found a job at the Voreux coal mine. But work was hard, wages were low and safety left much to be desired. Lantier tried to organize the miners into a union. When mine manager Hennebeau refused to negotiate, the workers launched a general strike, which ended with the intervention of the troops.

title: Geronimo: An American Legend
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Western Action & Comedy > Westerns

details.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
details.description: The Apache Indians have reluctantly agreed to settle on a US Government approved reservation. Not all the Apaches are able to adapt to the life of corn farmers. One in particular, Geronimo, is restless. Pushed over the edge by broken promises and necessary actions by the government, Geronimo and thirty or so other warriors form an attack team which humiliates the government by evading capture, while reclaiming what is rightfully theirs.

title: Get Shorty
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Gangland Satires

details.title: Get Shorty
details.description: Chili Palmer is a Miami mobster who gets sent to L.A. to collect a bad debt from Harry Zimm, a Hollywood producer who specializes in cheesy horror films. When Chili meets Harry's leading lady, the romantic sparks fly. After pitching his own life story as a movie idea, Chili learns that being a mobster and being a Hollywood producer really aren't all that different.

title: Get on the Bus
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Animation, Comedy & Adventure > Teen Road Movies

details.title: Get on the Bus
details.description: Several Black men take a cross-country bus trip to attend the Million Man March in Washington, DC in 1995. On the bus are an eclectic set of characters including a laid-off aircraft worker, a man whose at-risk son is handcuffed to him, a black Republican, a former gangsta, a Hollywood actor, a cop who is of mixed racial background, and a white bus driver. All make the trek discussing issues surrounding the march, including manhood, religion, politics, and race.

title: Getting Away With Murder
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Twisted Romances

details.title: Getting Away With Murder
details.description: When the very moralistic college ethics instructor Jack Lambert finds himself living next door to an accused German death camp commander, he takes it upon himself to rid the world of this man.

title: Getting Even with Dad
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Wacky Family Misadventures

details.title: Getting Even with Dad
details.description: Con man Ray is going after one last heist – a stash of rare coins – when his estranged son Timmy unexpectedly shows up. Ray is too preoccupied with his robbery to spend time with his son, so Timmy blackmails him into acting like a father, hiding the coins and promises to return them only after Ray takes him to amusement parks and baseball games.

title: Ghost
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: Ghost
details.description: After a young man is murdered, his spirit stays behind to warn his lover of impending danger, with the help of a reluctant psychic.

title: Ghost in the Shell (Kokaku kidotai)
full_path: Science, Space & Futuristic Frontiers > Sci-Fi, Action & Dystopian > Tech-Noirs

details.title: Ghost in the Shell (Kokaku kidotai)
details.description: Cyborg detective Batou is assigned to investigate a series of murders committed by gynoids—doll-like cyborgs, which all malfunctioned, killed, then self-destructed afterwards. The brains of the gynoids initialize in order to protect their manufacturer's software, but in one gynoid, which Batou himself neutralized, one file remains: a voice speaking the phrase "Help me."

title: Ghosts of Mississippi
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > Tragic Icons

details.title: Ghosts of Mississippi
details.description: A Mississippi district attorney and the widow of Medgar Evers struggle to bring a white supremacist to justice for the 1963 murder of the civil rights leader.

title: Giant
full_path: Drama, Justice & Social Commentary > Classic Drama & Social Justice > Social Dramas

details.title: Giant
details.description: Wealthy rancher Bick Benedict and dirt-poor cowboy Jett Rink both woo Leslie Lynnton, a beautiful young woman from Maryland who is new to Texas. She marries Benedict, but she is shocked by the racial bigotry of the White Texans against the local people of Mexican descent. Rink discovers oil on a small plot of land, and while he uses his vast, new wealth to buy all the land surrounding the Benedict ranch, the Benedict's disagreement over prejudice fuels conflict that runs across generations.

title: Gigi
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > European Escapades

details.title: Gigi
details.description: A home, a motorcar, servants, the latest fashions: the most eligible and most finicky bachelor in Paris offers them all to Gigi. But she, who's gone from girlish gawkishness to cultured glamour before our eyes, yearns for that wonderful something money can't buy.

title: Girl 6
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Lgbtq+ Comedy Romances & Relationships > Queer Romances

details.title: Girl 6
details.description: A struggling actress in New York City takes a job as a phone sex operator.

title: Glengarry Glen Ross
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Corporate Thrillers

details.title: Glengarry Glen Ross
details.description: Times are tough at Premiere Properties. Shelley "the machine" Levene and Dave Moss are veteran salesmen, but only Ricky Roma is on a hot streak. The new Glengarry sales leads could turn everything around, but the front office is holding them back until these "losers" prove themselves. Then someone decides to take matters into his own hands, stealing the Glengarry leads and leaving everyone wondering who did it.

title: Glory
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > War Heroes & Legends

details.title: Glory
details.description: Robert Gould Shaw leads the US Civil War's first all-black volunteer company, fighting prejudices of both his own Union army and the Confederates.

title: Go Fish
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Lgbtq+ Comedy Romances & Relationships > Queer Romances

details.title: Go Fish
details.description: Max is a trendy, pretty, young lesbian, who is having trouble finding love. A friend sets her up with Ely, whom Max likes, but Ely is frumpy, homely, and older. Nor do they have much in common. Can Max learn to look past the packaging?

title: Gold Diggers: The Secret of Bear Mountain
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: Gold Diggers: The Secret of Bear Mountain
details.description: Two teen girls, one from the city, one from the country, try to find the hidden gold of Bear Mountain learning about friendship, loyalty and courage on the way.

title: GoldenEye
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Futuristic Uprisings

details.title: GoldenEye
details.description: When a powerful satellite system falls into the hands of Alec Trevelyan, AKA Agent 006, a former ally-turned-enemy, only James Bond can save the world from a dangerous space weapon that -- in one short pulse -- could destroy the earth! As Bond squares off against his former compatriot, he also battles Xenia Onatopp, an assassin who uses pleasure as her ultimate weapon.

title: Gone Fishin'
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Whimsical Escapades

details.title: Gone Fishin'
details.description: Two fishing fanatics get in trouble when their fishing boat gets stolen while on a trip.

title: Gone with the Wind
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > War-Torn Romances

details.title: Gone with the Wind
details.description: The spoiled daughter of a Georgia plantation owner conducts a tumultuous romance with a cynical profiteer during the American Civil War and Reconstruction Era.

title: Good Man in Africa, A
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: Good Man in Africa, A
details.description: Morgan Leafy is a secretary to the British High Commissioner to an Africa nation. Leafy is a man that makes himself useful to his boss, the snobbish Arthur Fanshawe, who has no clue about what's going on around him, but who wants to use his secretary to carry on his dirty work, which involves getting one of the most powerful men in the country to do business with his country.The young secretary has an eye for beautiful women around him, especially Hazel, a native beauty, with whom he is having an affair. Things get complicated because Sam Adekunle, a man running for president of the country, wants a favor from Leafy in return after he has accepted the invitation to visit London. The proposition involves swaying a prominent doctor's opposition to a plan that will make Adenkule filthy rich.

title: Good Will Hunting
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Small Town Dramas > Personal Journeys

details.title: Good Will Hunting
details.description: Headstrong yet aimless, Will Hunting has a genius-level IQ but chooses to work as a janitor at MIT. When he secretly solves highly difficult graduate-level math problems, his talents are discovered by Professor Gerald Lambeau, who decides to help the misguided youth reach his potential. When Will is arrested for attacking a police officer, Professor Lambeau makes a deal to get leniency for him if he gets court-ordered therapy. Eventually, therapist Dr. Sean Maguire helps Will confront the demons that are holding him back.

title: GoodFellas
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Gangster Films

details.title: GoodFellas
details.description: The true story of Henry Hill, a half-Irish, half-Sicilian Brooklyn kid who is adopted by neighbourhood gangsters at an early age and climbs the ranks of a Mafia family under the guidance of Jimmy Conway.

title: Goofy Movie, A
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Teenage Escapades

details.title: Goofy Movie, A
details.description: An endearing modern-day story about how the lovable Goof bonds with his teenage son Max on a hilarious cross-country road trip. En route to the ol' fishing hole, they find themselves up to their floppy ears in misadventure!

title: Gordy
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Whimsical Escapades

details.title: Gordy
details.description: A talking pig named Gordy becomes involved in a quest to save his family from the slaughterhouse.

title: Grace of My Heart
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Music Biopics

details.title: Grace of My Heart
details.description: Philadelphia teenager Edna Buxton wins a talent contest during the early rock 'n' roll era, changes her name to Denise Waverly and moves to New York City to make it big. Though she flops as a recording artist, fast-talking record producer Joel Millner recognizes her songwriting talent and teams her with struggling songsmith Howard Caszatt.

title: Grand Day Out, A
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Stop-Motion Comedies

details.title: Grand Day Out, A
details.description: Wallace and Gromit have run out of cheese, and this provides an excellent excuse for the duo to take their holiday to the moon, where, as everyone knows, there is ample cheese.  Preserved by the Academy Film Archive.

title: Grateful Dead
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Music & Mockumentary > Mockumentaries

details.title: Grateful Dead
details.description: Recorded live at Giza Sound & Light Theater in Cairo Egypt, September 15th-16th, 1978.

title: Grease
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Comedy, Coming-Of-Age & Romance > Teen Comedies

details.title: Grease
details.description: Australian good girl Sandy and greaser Danny fell in love over the summer. But when they unexpectedly discover they're now in the same high school, will they be able to rekindle their romance despite their eccentric friends?

title: Grease 2
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Teenage Transformations

details.title: Grease 2
details.description: It's 1961, two years after the original Grease gang graduated, and there's a new crop of seniors and new members of the coolest cliques on campus, the Pink Ladies and T-Birds. Michael Carrington is the new kid in school - but he's been branded a brainiac. Can he fix up an old motorcycle, don a leather jacket, avoid a rumble with the leader of the T-Birds, and win the heart of Pink Lady Stephanie?

title: Great Expectations
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > Turbulent Liaisons

details.title: Great Expectations
details.description: Orphan Pip discovers through lawyer Mr. Jaggers that a mysterious benefactor wishes to ensure that he becomes a gentleman. Reunited with his childhood patron, Miss Havisham, and his first love, the beautiful but emotionally cold Estella, he discovers that the elderly spinster has gone mad from having been left at the altar as a young woman, and has made her charge into a warped, unfeeling heartbreaker.

title: Gridlock'd
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Satirical Dramas

details.title: Gridlock'd
details.description: After a friend overdoses, Spoon and Stretch decide to kick their drug habits and attempt to enroll in a government detox program. Their efforts are hampered by seemingly endless red tape, as they are shuffled from one office to another while being chased by drug dealers and the police.

title: Grosse Fatigue
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Relationships & Family > French Character Studies

details.title: Grosse Fatigue
details.description: Stressed and overworked, famous French movie star Michel Blanc is beginning to wear down, physically and mentally, from the pressure and demands of fame. Already in a fragile state of mind, strange events start to transpire all around him, and he gradually loses his grip. Taking the advice of a psychiatrist, Blanc retreats to the countryside with his friend Carole Bouquet, but Blanc still has not managed to escape all of his problems.

title: Grosse Pointe Blank
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Hostage Capers

details.title: Grosse Pointe Blank
details.description: Hitman Martin Blank becomes a moving target after he rebuffs a fellow assassin's invitation to form a union. On the advice of his quirky assistant and neurotic psychiatrist, Martin begrudgingly heads out to Grosse Pointe, Michigan for his ten-year high school reunion, where he soon comes across the woman he jilted on prom night.

title: Groundhog Day
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Quirky Encounters

details.title: Groundhog Day
details.description: A narcissistic TV weatherman, along with his attractive-but-distant producer, and his mawkish cameraman, is sent to report on Groundhog Day in the small town of Punxsutawney, where he finds himself repeating the same day over and over.

title: Grumpier Old Men
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Lighthearted Escapades

details.title: Grumpier Old Men
details.description: A family wedding reignites the ancient feud between next-door neighbors and fishing buddies John and Max. Meanwhile, a sultry Italian divorcée opens a restaurant at the local bait shop, alarming the locals who worry she'll scare the fish away. But she's less interested in seafood than she is in cooking up a hot time with Max.

title: Guantanamera
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: Guantanamera
details.description: During the 'Special Period', the members of a funeral procession cross paths with truckdrivers who have to take the same route, and begin to talk about God and the world. They discover that life for both groups has many similarities, as well as a lot of differences.

title: Guilty as Sin
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > Courtroom Dramas

details.title: Guilty as Sin
details.description: Before a criminal lawyer knows what has happened, she is forced to defend a wife killer she knows is guilty.

title: Gumby: The Movie
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Fantasy Adventures

details.title: Gumby: The Movie
details.description: Amidst putting together a benefit concert for the local farmers and on the brink of a huge deal with mogul Lucky Claybert, Gumby and his band The Clayboys must battle with the villainous Blockheads, who have kidnapped their loyal canine Lowbelly.

title: Hackers
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Virtual Rebels

details.title: Hackers
details.description: Along with his new friends, a teenager who was arrested by the US Secret Service and banned from using a computer for writing a computer virus discovers a plot by a nefarious hacker, but they must use their computer skills to find the evidence while being pursued by the Secret Service and the evil computer genius behind the virus.

title: Half Baked
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Quirky Comedies

details.title: Half Baked
details.description: Three lovable party buds try to bail their friend out of jail. But just when the guys have mastered a plan, everything comes dangerously close to going up in smoke.

title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
details.description: Six years after being presumed dead in a fire, and just as the town prepares to finally celebrate Halloween again, Michael Myers returns to Haddonfield to continue his reign of terror.

title: Hamlet
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > Turbulent Liaisons

details.title: Hamlet
details.description: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, returns home to find his father murdered and his mother now marrying the murderer... his uncle. Meanwhile, war is brewing.

title: Hana-bi
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > Crime Dramas

details.title: Hana-bi
details.description: Beleaguered police detective Nishi takes desperate measures to try and set things right in a world gone wrong. With his wife suffering from leukemia and his business partner paralyzed from a brutal gangster attack, Nishi borrows from a yakuza loan shark and then robs a bank to clear his debt.

title: Happy Gilmore
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Sports Comedies

details.title: Happy Gilmore
details.description: Failed hockey player-turned-golf whiz Happy Gilmore — whose unconventional approach and antics on the green courts the ire of rival Shooter McGavin — is determined to win a PGA tournament so he can save his granny's house with the prize money. Meanwhile, an attractive tour publicist tries to soften Happy's image.

title: Hard Eight
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Desperate Pursuits

details.title: Hard Eight
details.description: A stranger mentors a young Reno gambler who weds a hooker and befriends a vulgar casino regular.

title: Hard Rain
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Thrillers

details.title: Hard Rain
details.description: An armored car driver tries to elude a gang of thieves while a flood ravages the countryside.

title: Hard Target
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Vigilante Films

details.title: Hard Target
details.description: When a woman's father goes missing, she enlists a local to aid in her search.  The pair soon discover that her father has died at the hands of a wealthy sportsman who hunts homeless men as a form of recreation.

title: Harlem
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Satirical Dramas

details.title: Harlem
details.description: This propaganda film was partly inspired by the story of the first Italian heavyweight champion Primo Carnera who, after winning the title with Al Capone’s help in 1933, was beaten the following year by the Jewish Max Bear and then again by the ‘Brown Bomber’ Detroit Joe Lewis in June 1935, on the eve of the Italian invasion of Ethiopia. This match provoked numerous racial skirmishes on the streets of Harlem between the Black community and pro-Fascist Italian-Americans. The film overturns historical facts and here, obviously, it is the white boxer who wins in order to demonstrate the superiority of the “Aryan Italians” over the “sinister Jewish entrepreneurs” and the “savage Afro-American fans in Yankee Stadium”. In the film, these were played by South African prisoners-of-war interred in a work camp, which the German and Italian propaganda ministries had set up near Cinecittà “for cinematic purposes”.

title: Harold and Maude
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Quirky Dramedies

details.title: Harold and Maude
details.description: The young Harold lives in his own world of suicide-attempts and funeral visits to avoid the misery of his current family and home environment. Harold meets an 80-year-old woman named Maude who also lives in her own world yet one in which she is having the time of her life. When the two opposites meet they realize that their differences don’t matter and they become best friends and love each other.

title: Harriet the Spy
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Teenage Escapades

details.title: Harriet the Spy
details.description: When the secret notebook of a young girl who fancies herself a spy is found by her friends, her speculations make her very unpopular! Can she win her friends back?

title: Hate (Haine, La)
full_path: Drama, Family & Social Heritage > Coming-Of-Age & Drama Films > Youth Dramas

details.title: Hate (Haine, La)
details.description: After a chaotic night of rioting in a marginal suburb of Paris, three young friends, Vinz, Hubert and Saïd, wander around unoccupied waiting for news about the state of health of a mutual friend who has been seriously injured when confronting the police.

title: Head Above Water
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Teenage Transformations

details.title: Head Above Water
details.description: Elisa, a fiery and passionate teenager, wants to enjoy the summer of her 17 years on the steep slopes of the Vercors where she grew up. But her mother leaves the house and leaves her alone with her father to look after her disabled sister. An increasingly heavy responsibility that makes love switch to hatred.

title: Hear My Song
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Uplifting Journeys

details.title: Hear My Song
details.description: The actress wants to sing. But her music is far short compared to her brilliant acting. As everyone closes their ears to her song, a man begins to listen to her heart.

title: Hearts and Minds
full_path: Darkness, Fear & Human Conflict > War, Drama & Thriller > Vietnam War Dramas

details.title: Hearts and Minds
details.description: Many times during his presidency, Lyndon B. Johnson said that ultimate victory in the Vietnam War depended upon the U.S. military winning the "hearts and minds" of the Vietnamese people. Filmmaker Peter Davis uses Johnson's phrase in an ironic context in this anti-war documentary, filmed and released while the Vietnam War was still under way, juxtaposing interviews with military figures like U.S. Army Chief of Staff William C. Westmoreland with shocking scenes of violence and brutality.

title: Heat
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Cat-And-Mouse Thrillers

details.title: Heat
details.description: Obsessive master thief Neil McCauley leads a top-notch crew on various daring heists throughout Los Angeles while determined detective Vincent Hanna pursues him without rest. Each man recognizes and respects the ability and the dedication of the other even though they are aware their cat-and-mouse game may end in violence.

title: Heathers
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Small Town Terrors

details.title: Heathers
