details.description: When a powerful spell turns her parents into giant monsters, a teenage princess must journey into the wild to reverse the curse before it's too late.

title: Sphere
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Horror, Sci-Fi & Adventure Films > Alien Invasion Films

details.title: Sphere
details.description: A spacecraft is discovered on the floor of the Pacific Ocean, presumed to be at least 300 years old and of alien origin. A crack team of scientists and experts is assembled and taken to the Habitat, a state-of-the-art underwater living environment, to investigate.

title: Spice World
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Lighthearted Escapades

details.title: Spice World
details.description: World famous pop group the Spice Girls zip around London in their luxurious double decker tour bus having various adventures and performing for their fans.

title: Sprung
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Social Climbers

details.title: Sprung
details.description: Two pairs of best friends - Montel & Clyde and Brandy & Adina meet at the party, where Clyde makes Adina think he is very rich and gets her into bed the same evening. When Adina finds out that she's been fooled, she becomes Clyde's worst enemy. Meanwhile Montel and Brandy fall in love and plan to marry, and Adina and Clyde try to do everything to stop them.

title: Spy Hard
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Hostage Capers

details.title: Spy Hard
details.description: The evil Gen. Rancor has his sights set on world domination, and only one man can stop him: Dick Steele, also known as Agent WD-40. Rancor needs to obtain a computer circuit for the missile that he is planning to fire, so Steele teams up with Veronique Ukrinsky, a KGB agent whose father designed the chip. Together they try to locate the evil mastermind's headquarters, where Veronique's father and several other hostages are being held.

title: Squeeze
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Thriller, Crime & Deception > Ira Thrillers

details.title: Squeeze
details.description: Richard Turner made Squeeze to break the "conspiracy of silence" about homosexuality. A pioneering early portrait of Auckland's LGBT scene, Squeeze centres on the relationship between a young man (Paul Eady) and the confident executive (Robert Shannon) who romances him, then mentions he has a fiancée. The film was discussed in Parliament after Patricia Bartlett campaigned against the possibility it might get NZ Film Commission funding (it didn't). Kevin Thomas in The LA Times praised Squeeze's integrity and the "steadfast compassion with which it views its hero".

title: Stag
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Sci-Fi, Mystery & Romance Thrillers > Techno Thrillers

details.title: Stag
details.description: Gold reappears after vanishing for months. His car breaks down in a remote area. He meets peculiar people in a house. Waking up in his car, he questions if it was a dream or reality.

title: Stalingrad
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > War Heroes & Legends

details.title: Stalingrad
details.description: A German Platoon is explored through the brutal fighting of the Battle of Stalingrad. After half of their number is wiped out and they're placed under the command of a sadistic captain, the platoon lieutenant leads his men to desert. The platoon members attempt escape from the city, now surrounded by the Soviet Army.

title: Stalker
full_path: Darkness, Fear & Human Conflict > Thriller & Survival Dramas > Female Survival Thrillers

details.title: Stalker
details.description: A fashion stylist finds herself being stalked by a man after her car breaks down in the countryside.

title: Stand by Me
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Small Town Dramas > Quirky Communities

details.title: Stand by Me
details.description: After learning that a boy their age has been accidentally killed near their rural homes, four boys decide to go see the body. On the way, Gordie, Vern, Chris and Teddy encounter a mean junk man and a marsh full of leeches, as they also learn more about one another and their very different home lives. Just a lark at first, the boys' adventure evolves into a defining event in their lives.

title: Star Kid
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: Star Kid
details.description: Shy seventh-grader Spencer Griffith's life changes when the meteor falls into local junkyard and he finds a Cybersuit - the wise and strong robot from another galaxy. Spencer puts Cybersuit on and becomes a different kind of guy

title: Star Maps
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Coming-Of-Age Dramas & Comedies > Coming-Of-Age Satires

details.title: Star Maps
details.description: Carlos wants to be an actor. But his father, Pepe, wants him to work in the family business, that is, male prostitution. Carlos decides that he will be one of his father's boys until he can get his foot in the door in Hollywood.

title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
details.description: A surprise visit from Spock's father provides a startling revelation: McCoy is harboring Spock's living essence.

title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
details.description: When a huge alien probe enters the galaxy and begins to vaporize Earth's oceans, Kirk and his crew must travel back in time in order to bring back whales and save the planet.

title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
details.description: A renegade Vulcan with a startling secret hijacks the U.S.S. Enterprise in order to find a mythical planet.

title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Space Comedies

details.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
details.description: After years of war, the Federation and the Klingon empire find themselves on the brink of a peace summit when a Klingon ship is nearly destroyed by an apparent attack from the Enterprise. Both worlds brace for what may be their deadliest encounter.

title: Star Trek: First Contact
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Trek: First Contact
details.description: The Borg, a relentless race of cyborgs, are on a direct course for Earth. Violating orders to stay away from the battle, Captain Picard and the crew of the newly-commissioned USS Enterprise E pursue the Borg back in time to prevent the invaders from changing Federation history and assimilating the galaxy.

title: Star Trek: Generations
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Trek: Generations
details.description: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-D find themselves at odds with the renegade scientist Soran who is destroying entire star systems. Only one man can help Picard stop Soran's scheme...and he's been dead for seventy-eight years.

title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
details.description: When an unidentified alien destroys three powerful Klingon cruisers, Captain James T. Kirk returns to the newly transformed U.S.S. Enterprise to take command.

title: Star Trek: The Wrath of Khan
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Trek: The Wrath of Khan
details.description: The starship Enterprise and its crew is pulled back into action when old nemesis, Khan, steals a top secret device called Project Genesis.

title: Star Wars
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: Star Wars
details.description: Princess Leia is captured and held hostage by the evil Imperial forces in their effort to take over the galactic Empire. Venturesome Luke Skywalker and dashing captain Han Solo team together with the loveable robot duo R2-D2 and C-3PO to rescue the beautiful princess and restore peace and justice in the Empire.

title: Stargate
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Futuristic Uprisings

details.title: Stargate
details.description: An interstellar teleportation device, found in Egypt, leads to a planet with humans resembling ancient Egyptians who worship the god Ra.

title: Starship Troopers
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Space Comedies

details.title: Starship Troopers
details.description: Set in the future, the story follows a young soldier named Johnny Rico and his exploits in the Mobile Infantry. Rico's military career progresses from recruit to non-commissioned officer and finally to officer against the backdrop of an interstellar war between mankind and an arachnoid species known as "the Bugs."

title: Steal Big, Steal Little
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: Steal Big, Steal Little
details.description: Ruben and Robby are twin brothers, adopted by Mona, one of the wealthiest - and most eccentric - women in Santa Barbara. Ruben is devoted to Mona, but Robby is more devoted to her money. So when Mona leaves her fortune and estate to Ruben it starts a battle between brothers that soon leads to madness, mayhem, and even attempted murder. On Ruben's side is Lou Perilli an ex-Chicago cop and used car dealer who knows the law - and how to get around it. On Robby's side is ruthless businessman Reed Tyler, who is out to turn a swift profit on Mona's property. Walking a shifty line between them is Eddie Agopian, the family lawyer, who doesn't care which side wins as long as he's on the winner's side. But whether they're stealing big or stealing little, they're all stealing in this hilarious comedy about greed, power... and brotherly love.

title: Stealing Beauty
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Teenage Transformations

details.title: Stealing Beauty
details.description: Lucy Harmon, an American teenager is arriving in the lush Tuscan countryside to be sculpted by a family friend who lives in a beautiful villa. Lucy visited there four years earlier and exchanged a kiss with an Italian boy with whom she hopes to become reacquainted.

title: Steel
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Vigilante Films

details.title: Steel
details.description: When a renegade military reject puts new superweapons in dangerous hands, John Henry Irons becomes Steel. Wearing body armor, wielding a fearsome electrohammer and riding a gadget-packed motorcycle, he's ready to wage war... if he can fix the untimely glitches in his untested gear.

title: Stephen King's The Langoliers
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: Stephen King's The Langoliers
details.description: The Langoliers is a horror miniseries about ten airline passengers who become accidental witnesses to the mysteries of time. It was directed and written by Tom Holland and based on the novella by Stephen King from the four-part anthology book Four Past Midnight. The series was produced by Mitchell Galin and David R. Kappes, for Laurel Entertainment, Inc. It originally aired May 14–15, 1995 on the ABC network in episodes of 1½ hours each.

title: Stonewall
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Coming-Of-Age Dramas & Comedies > Queer Dramas

details.title: Stonewall
details.description: Kicked out by his parents, a gay teenager leaves small-town Indiana for New York's Greenwich Village, where growing discrimination against the gay community leads to riots on June 28, 1969.

title: Strange Days
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Virtual Rebels

details.title: Strange Days
details.description: Former policeman Lenny Nero has moved into a more lucrative trade: the illegal sale of virtual reality-like recordings that allow users to experience the emotions and past experiences of others. While they typically contain tawdry incidents, Nero is shocked when he receives one showing a murder.

title: Stranger in the House
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > Courtroom Dramas

details.title: Stranger in the House
details.description: John Sawyer, once an eminent barrister, has slid into a life of cynicism and drunkenness since his wife left him. When his daughter's boyfriend is accused of murder, Sawyer decides to try to pull himself together and defend him in court.

title: Strawberry and Chocolate (Fresa y chocolate)
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Psychedelic Drama & Coming-Of-Age > Psychedelic Dramas

details.title: Strawberry and Chocolate (Fresa y chocolate)
details.description: A novice eats some special mushrooms and changes her personality acting like a crazy psychedelic girl.

title: Street Fighter
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Sci-Fi, Mystery & Romance Thrillers > Techno Thrillers

details.title: Street Fighter
details.description: In 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu and Ken Masters are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don't, it's GAME OVER!

title: Streetcar Named Desire, A
full_path: Drama, Justice & Social Commentary > Classic Drama & Social Justice > Social Dramas

details.title: Streetcar Named Desire, A
details.description: After losing her home and her job, Blanche arrives at the home of her younger sister, Stella, and Stella’s husband Stanley, seeking comfort and solace. She is horrified to discover that they live in a crumbling, cramped apartment in a poor immigrant neighborhood. She perceives Stanley as a rough, uncouth and violent man, and the clash between them escalates into a fierce confrontation, in which passions erupt,and long-buried secrets threaten to shatter her psyche.

title: Strictly Ballroom
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Uplifting Dramedies

details.title: Strictly Ballroom
details.description: Brave new steps put Scott's career in jeopardy. With a new partner and determination, can he still succeed?

title: Striking Distance
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Serial Killer Thrillers

details.title: Striking Distance
details.description: Coming from a police family, Tom Hardy ends up fighting his uncle after the murder of his father. Tom believes the killer is another cop, and goes on the record with his allegations. Demoted to water-way duty Tom, along with new partner Jo Christman, navigate the three rivers looking for clues and discovering bodies. This time the victims are women Tom knows, he must find the killer to prove his innocence.

title: Stripes
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Space Comedies

details.title: Stripes
details.description: Hard-luck cabbie John Winger, directionless after being fired from his job and dumped by his girlfriend, enlists in the U.S. Army with his close pal, Russell Ziskey. After his barely satisfactory performance in basic training, the irreverent Winger emerges as the figurehead for a ragtag band of misfits. However, his hijinks threaten to cause an international scandal when he inadvertently commandeers a military assault vehicle behind enemy lines.

title: Striptease
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Twisted Romances

details.title: Striptease
details.description: Bounced from her job, Erin Grant needs money if she's to have any chance of winning back custody of her child. But, eventually, she must confront the naked truth: to take on the system, she'll have to take it all off. Erin strips to conquer, but she faces unintended circumstances when a hound dog of a Congressman zeroes in on her and sharpens the shady tools at his fingertips, including blackmail and murder.

title: Stuart Saves His Family
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Social Satires

details.title: Stuart Saves His Family
details.description: A self-help advocate struggles to put his dysfunctional family in its place.

title: SubUrbia
full_path: Drama, Family & Social Heritage > Coming-Of-Age & Drama Films > Youth Dramas

details.title: SubUrbia
details.description: When household tensions and a sense of worthlessness overcome Evan, he finds escape when he clings with the orphans of a throw-away society. The runaways hold on to each other like a family until a tragedy tears them apart.

title: Sudden Death
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Thriller, Crime & Deception > Deception Thrillers

details.title: Sudden Death
details.description: When Ed Neilson's entire family is viciously murdered, he pleads with retired CIA operative Duke Smith (Robert Conrad) to investigate. He refuses, but relents after Neilson too meets an explosive death. Deception, international intrigue and a ruthless "syndicate of businessmen" intent on raping a South Pacific Islands nation of its resources keep the pace fast.

title: Sudden Manhattan
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Offbeat Comedies

details.title: Sudden Manhattan
details.description: Twenty-something Donna is jobless, single and broke. On a fateful day, reality turns itself upside down, and she is suddenly faced with one absurdity after another.

title: Sunset Blvd.
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Psychedelic Drama & Coming-Of-Age > Psychedelic Dramas

details.title: Sunset Blvd.
details.description: Commissioned by The Getty Museum on the occasion of their 2019 Getty Medal to the painter, draftsman, photographer, and bookmaker, Ed Ruscha. Utilizing The Getty Research Institute's preservation and digitization of over a million images from Ed's Streets of Los Angeles photo series, and excerpts from Jack Kerouac's "On The Road," this film puts together two of Ed's major inspirations: Kerouac's text and the city of Los Angeles.

title: Sunset Park
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Sports Drama & Coming-Of-Age > Underdog Sports Dramas

details.title: Sunset Park
details.description: A school teacher takes over a talented, but undisciplined high school basketball team and turns them into a winning team.

title: Super Mario Bros.
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Fantasy Adventures

details.title: Super Mario Bros.
details.description: While working underground to fix a water main, Brooklyn plumbers—and brothers—Mario and Luigi are transported down a mysterious pipe and wander into a magical new world. But when the brothers are separated, Mario embarks on an epic quest to find Luigi.

title: Supercop
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Martial Arts & Comedy > Hong Kong Actioners

details.title: Supercop
details.description: As a crime wave sweeps through Hong Kong, the police call Jessica Yang, a rising star in the ranks, to help stop a notorious gang of thieves! What Jessica doesn't realize is that her boyfriend – recently discharged from the force – is the leader of this ruthless crime ring!

title: Surviving Picasso
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Artistic Visionaries

details.title: Surviving Picasso
details.description: The passionate Merchant-Ivory drama tells the story of Francoise Gilot, the only lover of Pablo Picasso who was strong enough to withstand his ferocious cruelty and move on with her life.

title: Surviving the Game
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: Surviving the Game
details.description: A homeless man is hired as a survival guide for a group of wealthy businessmen on a hunting trip in the mountains, unaware that they are killers who hunt humans for sport, and that he is their new prey.

title: Suture
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Identity Thrillers

details.title: Suture
details.description: Brothers Vincent and Clay meet up for the first time after their father's funeral and remark on how similar they look. But unknown to Clay, Vince is actually plotting to kill him with a car bomb and pass the corpse off as his own, planning to start a new life elsewhere with his father's inheritance. But Clay survives the blast and has his face, memory and identity restored in hospital... but are they the right ones?

title: Sweet Nothing
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Psychedelic Drama & Coming-Of-Age > Psychedelic Dramas

details.title: Sweet Nothing
details.description: Aella takes 250ug of LSD.

title: Swept from the Sea
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Romances

details.title: Swept from the Sea
details.description: The film tells the story of Russian emigree and the only survivor from ship crash Yanko Goorall and servant Amy Foster in the end of 19th century. When Yanko enters a farm sick and hungry after the shipwreck, everyone is afraid of him, except for Amy, who is very kind and helps him. Soon he becomes like a son for Dr. James Kennedy and romance between Yanko and Amy follows.

title: Swimming with Sharks
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Dark Comedies

details.title: Swimming with Sharks
details.description: Guy is a young film executive who's willing to do whatever it takes to make it in Hollywood. He begins working for famed producer Buddy Ackerman, a domineering, manipulative, coldhearted boss. When Guy also finds out that his cynical girlfriend, Dawn, has been using sex as a career move, he reaches his limit. Guy decides to exact revenge on Buddy by kidnapping him and subjecting him to cruel and unusual punishment.

title: Swingers
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Mystery & Thriller > Psychological Dramas

details.title: Swingers
details.description: Despite Diana's insecure nature, she and her husband Julian agree with the idea to sexually experiment with another couple. They put out an ad on the net to which the well experienced Alex and Timo react. We follow Diana and Julian as they prepare for the arrival of Alex and Timo, who they have invited to their home for the weekend. Diana is nervous. As soon as she is confronted with the self-confident and ravishingly sexy Alex, her insecurity increases even more. Timo seems disinterested, a sharp contrast to the boyish excitement of Julian. But as night falls and their sexual exploration begins, we notice Timo may not be as casual as he initially seemed and Diana on the other hand contains hidden strength. And so we realize there's more to 'Swingers' than just sex. Swingers: could your relationship stand the test?

title: Swiss Family Robinson
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Whimsical Escapades

details.title: Swiss Family Robinson
details.description: After being shipwrecked, the Robinson family is marooned on an island inhabited only by an impressive array of wildlife. In true pioneer spirit, they quickly make themselves at home but soon face a danger even greater than nature: dastardly pirates.

title: Switchback
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Serial Killer Thrillers

details.title: Switchback
details.description: After FBI agent Frank Lacrosse believes his son was kidnapped by a notorious serial killer, he travels to Amarillo, Texas, where he believes the murderer is in hiding. Although officially taken off the case because of its personal significance to him, Frank continues to pursue the killer, causing concern for local sheriff Buck Olmstead. When another victim pops up at a nearby car garage, Frank knows that he is as close as he'll ever be to tracking down the elusive killer.

title: Switchblade Sisters
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Comedy, Coming-Of-Age & Romance > Teen Comedies

details.title: Switchblade Sisters
details.description: The leader of an inner city girl gang is challenged when a new girl moves into the neighborhood.

title: Tales From the Crypt Presents: Demon Knight
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: Tales From the Crypt Presents: Demon Knight
details.description: Ex-soldier Frank Brayker is the guardian of an ancient key that can unlock tremendous evil; the sinister Collector is a demon who wants the key so he can initiate the apocalypse. On the run from wicked mercenaries for almost 90 years, Brayker finally stops in at a boarding house in New Mexico where — with the help of its residents — he plans to face off against the Collector and his band of ghouls, preventing them from ever seizing the key.

title: Tales from the Crypt Presents: Bordello of Blood
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: Tales from the Crypt Presents: Bordello of Blood
details.description: Private eye Rafe Guttman is hired by repressed, born-again Katherine to find her missing bad-boy brother. The trail leads him to a whorehouse run by a thousand-year-old vampire and secretly backed by Katherine's boss, televangelist Jimmy Current.

title: Tales from the Hood
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Gangland Satires

details.title: Tales from the Hood
details.description: A strange mortician tells four horrific tales to three drug dealers that he traps in their local funeral parlor.

title: Talking About Sex
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Entanglements

details.title: Talking About Sex
details.description: Andie Norman (Kim Wayans) is a young publisher who gets a chance to remake a dry-text on "assertive communication skills" into a best selling book to be titled 'Talking About Sex'. Andie's boyfriend, Doug Penn (Daniel Beer), is a good guy whose sex life with Andie begins tapering off as he finds watching sports on TV more interesting. Andie assembles her female friends to videotape a rough cut of a discussion program for a TV documentary for her book as a promotional item. All of Andie's and Doug's friends later get together for an all-night cocktail party at their house to celebrate the upcoming release of the book where Andie, Doug and their friends end up revealing intimacies to each other over too many drinks which include past bed-hopping and infidelity with puts a test on all relationships in both hilarious and heartfelt ways which leads to Andie and Doug to decide if they can have a future together.

title: Tank Girl
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Politics > Dystopian Satires

details.title: Tank Girl
details.description: After a comet disrupts the rain cycle of Earth, the planet has become a desolate, barren desert by the year 2033. With resources scarce, Kesslee, head of the powerful and evil Water & Power Corporation, the de facto government, has taken control of the water supply. Unwilling to cower under Kesslee's tyrannical rule, a pair of outlaws known as Tank Girl and Jet Girl rise up, joining the mysterious rebel Rippers to destroy the corrupt system.

title: Taxi Driver
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Mystery & Thriller > Psychological Dramas

details.title: Taxi Driver
details.description: Suffering from insomnia, disturbed loner Travis Bickle takes a job as a New York City cabbie, haunting the streets nightly, growing increasingly detached from reality as he dreams of cleaning up the filthy city.

title: Telling Lies in America
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Teenage Transformations

details.title: Telling Lies in America
details.description: A 17-year-old boy becomes friends with Billy Magic, the radio DJ he idolizes, and eventually slips into the payola and corruption of the entertainment world.

title: Temptress Moon (Feng Yue)
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Melodramas

details.title: Temptress Moon (Feng Yue)
details.description: Set in the decadent 1920s, Temptress Moon tells the very complicated story of a wealthy family living on the outskirts of Shanghai. Their youngest daughter, Ruyi, is brought up as a servant to her opium-addicted father and brother. Meanwhile, her brother-in-law Zhongliang has a successful, if illegal, career seducing and blackmailing married women in the city. When he comes to Ruyi's home the two fall in love, and trouble ensues.

title: Terminal Velocity
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Thrillers

details.title: Terminal Velocity
details.description: A maverick skydiver and a former KGB agent team up to stop the Russian mafia from stealing gold.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
full_path: Science, Space & Futuristic Frontiers > Sci-Fi, Action & Dystopian > Dystopian Futures

details.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
details.description: Ten years after the events of the original, a reprogrammed T-800 is sent back in time to protect young John Connor from the shape-shifting T-1000. Together with his mother Sarah, he fights to stop Skynet from triggering a nuclear apocalypse.

title: Tetsuo II: Body Hammer
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Virtual Rebels

details.title: Tetsuo II: Body Hammer
details.description: A Japanese salaryman finds his body transforming into a weapon through sheer rage after his son is kidnapped by a gang of violent thugs.

title: That Darn Cat!
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Wacky Family Misadventures

details.title: That Darn Cat!
details.description: A young woman suspects foul play when her cat comes home wearing a wristwatch. Convincing the FBI, though, and catching the bad guys is tougher than she imagined.

title: That Old Feeling
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Lighthearted Escapades

details.title: That Old Feeling
details.description: A bride's divorced parents find their old feelings for each other during the wedding reception and over the course of the next few days upsetting the newlywed's honeymoon.

title: That Thing You Do!
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Comedy, Coming-Of-Age & Romance > Teen Comedies

details.title: That Thing You Do!
details.description: A Pennsylvania band scores a hit in 1964 and rides the star-making machinery as long as it can, with lots of help from its manager. But behind the scenes, the group’s sudden fame tests their strength, their maturity and responsibility, and their ability to resist the temptations that money and notoriety always make possible.

title: The 39 Steps
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Thrillers

details.title: The 39 Steps
details.description: Richard Hannay, a mining engineer on holiday from the African colonies, finds London socialite life terribly dull. Yet it's more than he bargained for when a secret agent bursts into his room and entrusts him with a coded notebook, concerning the impending start of World War I. In no time both German agents and the British law are chasing him, ruthlessly coveting the Roman numerals code, which Hannay believes he must personally crack.

title: The Abyss
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Survival Films

details.title: The Abyss
details.description: A civilian oil rig crew is recruited to conduct a search and rescue effort when a nuclear submarine mysteriously sinks. One diver soon finds himself on a spectacular odyssey 25,000 feet below the ocean's surface where he confronts a mysterious force that has the power to change the world or destroy it.

title: The Addiction
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: The Addiction
details.description: A vampiric doctoral student tries to follow the philosophy of a nocturnal comrade and control her thirst for blood.

title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
details.description: One of puppet-maker Geppetto's creations comes magically to life. This puppet, Pinocchio, has one major desire and that is to become a real boy someday. In order to accomplish this goal he has to learn to act responsibly. This film shows you the adventures on which he learns valuable lessons.

title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Unconventional Upbringings

details.title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
details.description: Two drag performers and a transgender woman travel across the desert to perform their unique style of cabaret.

title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
full_path: Heroic Quests & Legendary Adventures > Action, Adventure & Swashbuckler > Swashbuckling Adventures

details.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
details.description: Robin Hood fights nobly for justice against the evil Sir Guy of Gisbourne while striving to win the hand of the beautiful Maid Marian.

title: The African Queen
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Documentary, Mystery & Adventure > Documentaries

details.title: The African Queen
details.description: At the start of the First World War, in the middle of Africa’s nowhere, a gin soaked riverboat captain is persuaded by a strong-willed missionary to go down river and face-off a German warship.

title: The Age of Innocence
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Romances

details.title: The Age of Innocence
details.description: In 19th century New York high society, a young lawyer falls in love with a woman separated from her husband, while he is engaged to the woman's cousin.

title: The Air Up There
full_path: Comedy, Adventure & Cultural Odyssey > Comedy & Adventure Films > Fish Out Of Water Comedies > Cultural Transplants

details.title: The Air Up There
details.description: Jimmy Dolan is a college basketball coach who wants a big promotion. To get it, he needs to make a dramatic find. He ends up deep in Africa, hoping to recruit Saleh, a huge basketball prodigy Jimmy glimpsed in a home movie. But Saleh is the chief's son and has responsibilities at home, since the tribe's land is threatened by a mining company with its own hotshot basketball team.

title: The Amazing Panda Adventure
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Wilderness Adventures

details.title: The Amazing Panda Adventure
details.description: Far from home in the lush bamboo forests of China, ten-year-old Ryan Tyler, with the help of a young girl, goes on a wonderful journey to rescue a baby panda taken by poachers.

title: The American President
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Quirky Encounters

details.title: The American President
details.description: Widowed U.S. president Andrew Shepherd, one of the world's most powerful men, can have anything he wants -- and what he covets most is Sydney Ellen Wade, a Washington lobbyist. But Shepherd's attempts at courting her spark wild rumors and decimate his approval ratings.

title: The Amityville Curse
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Haunted Houses

details.title: The Amityville Curse
details.description: After purchasing a property in Amityville, New York, Debbie and her husband invite three of their closest friends to help renovate. Immediately uneasy in her new surroundings, she begins experiencing shockingly vivid nightmares.

title: The Amityville Horror
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Haunted Houses

details.title: The Amityville Horror
details.description: George Lutz, his wife Kathy, and their three children have just moved into a beautiful, and improbably cheap, Dutch colonial mansion nestled in the sleepy coastal town of Amityville, Long Island. However, their dream home is concealing a horrific past and soon each member of the Lutz family is plagued with increasingly strange and violent visions and impulses.

title: The Apartment
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Suburban Dramas

details.title: The Apartment
details.description: Bud Baxter is a minor clerk in a huge New York insurance company, until he discovers a quick way to climb the corporate ladder. He lends out his apartment to the executives as a place to take their mistresses. Although he often has to deal with the aftermath of their visits, one night he's left with a major problem to solve.

title: The Apostle
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Relationships & Family > Southern Dramas

details.title: The Apostle
details.description: After his happy life spins out of control, a preacher from Texas changes his name, goes to Louisiana and starts preaching on the radio.

title: The Apple Dumpling Gang
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Western Action & Comedy > Western Comedies

details.title: The Apple Dumpling Gang
details.description: A roving bachelor gets saddled with three children and a wealth of trouble when the youngsters stumble upon a huge gold nugget. They join forces with two bumbling outlaws to fend off the greedy townspeople and soon find themselves facing a surly gang of sharpshooters.

title: The Aristocats
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Whimsical Escapades

details.title: The Aristocats
details.description: When Madame Adelaide Bonfamille leaves her fortune to Duchess and her children—Bonfamille’s beloved family of cats—the butler plots to steal the money and kidnaps the legatees, leaving them out on a country road. All seems lost until the wily Thomas O’Malley Cat and his jazz-playing alley cats come to the aristocats’ rescue.

title: The Arrival
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Horror, Sci-Fi & Adventure Films > Alien Invasion Films

details.title: The Arrival
details.description: Zane Ziminski is an astrophysicist who receives a message that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. Eerily soon after his discovery, Zane is fired. He then embarks on a search to determine the origins of the transmission that leads him into a Hitchcockian labyrinth of paranoia and intrigue.

title: The Assignment
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Cat-And-Mouse Thrillers

details.title: The Assignment
details.description: Jack Shaw has experienced the terror first-hand. He's a top CIA agent who's tracked international killer-for-hire Carlos "The Jackal" Sanchez for over twenty years and barely survived Carlos' devastating bombing of a Parisian cafe. Now, he finally gets a break when he discovers Carlos' dead ringer: American naval officer and dedicated family man Annibal Ramirez.

title: The Associate
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Social Climbers

details.title: The Associate
details.description: Laurel Ayres is a businesswoman trying to make it but unfortunately she works at a investment firm where she does all the work but all the senior investors like Frank Peterson grab all the credit. She then leaves and starts her own firm. While trying to find clients Laurel pretends that she has a male partner named Robert Cutty. And when she starts to do well all of her clients wants to meet Cutty which is difficult since he doesn't exist.

title: The Baby-Sitters Club
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Teenage Escapades

details.title: The Baby-Sitters Club
details.description: Seven junior-high-school girls organize a daycare camp for children while at the same time experiencing classic adolescent growing pains.

title: The Babysitter
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Action Thrillers

details.title: The Babysitter
details.description: When Cole stays up past his bedtime, he discovers that his hot babysitter is part of a Satanic cult that will stop at nothing to keep him quiet.

title: The Ballad of Narayama, The (Narayama Bus
full_path: Drama, Justice & Social Commentary > Classic Drama & Social Justice > Social Dramas

details.title: The Ballad of Narayama, The (Narayama Bus
details.description: In Kabuki style, the film tells the story of a remote mountain village where the scarcity of food leads to a voluntary but socially-enforced policy in which relatives carry 70-year-old family members up Narayama mountain to die. Granny Orin is approaching 70, content to embrace her fate. Her widowed son Tatsuhei cannot bear losing his mother, even as she arranges his marriage to a widow his age. Her grandson Kesa, who's girlfriend is pregnant, is selfishly happy to see Orin die. Around them, a family of thieves are dealt with severely, and an old man, past 70, whose son has cast him out, scrounges for food. Will Orin's loving and accepting spirit teach and ennoble her family?

title: The Band Wagon
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Classic Comedies

details.title: The Band Wagon
details.description: A Broadway artiste turns a faded film star's comeback vehicle into an artsy flop.

title: The Basketball Diaries
full_path: Drama, Family & Social Heritage > Coming-Of-Age & Drama Films > Youth Dramas

details.title: The Basketball Diaries
details.description: A high school basketball player’s life turns upside down after free-falling into the harrowing world of drug addiction.

title: The Beans of Egypt, Maine
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: The Beans of Egypt, Maine
details.description: The Beans are poor, proud, hated by all, but alive in the sense that they struggle against their lot and support each other in time of trouble. Earlene lives across the street from the Bean's trailer, and the view from her window is better than any daytime television soap opera; especially Beal Bean, and especially Beal Bean shirtless. When Reuben Bean is sent to prison for resisting arrest for out-of-season deer hunting, Beal takes up with Reuben's woman Roberta. He also has a child by Earlene, with a triangle of sex complicated by poverty.

title: The Beautician and the Beast
full_path: Comedy, Adventure & Cultural Odyssey > Comedy & Adventure Films > Fish Out Of Water Comedies > Cultural Transplants

details.title: The Beautician and the Beast
details.description: A New York City beautician is mistakenly hired as the school teacher for the children of the president of a small Eastern European country.

title: The Believers
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Haunted Houses

details.title: The Believers
details.description: Mourning the accidental death of his wife and having just moved to New York with his young son, laconic police psychologist Cal Jamison is reluctantly drawn into a series of grisly, ritualistic murders involving the immolation of two youths.

title: The Beverly Hillbillies
full_path: Comedy, Adventure & Cultural Odyssey > Comedy & Adventure Films > Fish Out Of Water Comedies > Cultural Transplants

details.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
details.description: Mild-mannered dirt-poor hill-dweller Jed Clampett strikes it rich when oil is discovered on his property. At cousin Pearl's insistence, he moves his family to Beverly Hills to better enjoy his newfound wealth.

title: The Big Bang Theory
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: The Big Bang Theory
details.description: The Big Bang Theory is a comedy about brilliant physicists, Leonard and Sheldon, who are the kind of 'beautiful minds' that understand how the universe works. But none of that genius helps them interact with people, especially women. All this begins to change when a free-spirited beauty named Penny moves in next door. Sheldon, Leonard's roommate, is quite content spending his nights playing Klingon Boggle with their socially dysfunctional friends, fellow Cal Tech Mechanical Engineer Wolowitz and Astrophysicist Koothrappali. However, Leonard sees in Penny a whole new universe of possibilities - including love.

title: The Big Blue, The (Grand bleu
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Music & Mockumentary > Mockumentaries

details.title: The Big Blue, The (Grand bleu
details.description: Making-off from The Big Blue movie

title: The Big Green
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Sports Comedies

details.title: The Big Green
details.description: In a depressed Texas town, British foreign exchange teacher Anna attempts to inject some life into her hopeless kids by introducing them to soccer. They're terrible at first, but Anna and her football-hero assistant whip them into shape. As they work overtime, the pair help kids build their self-esteem and also get involved in solving family squabbles.

title: The Big Lebowski
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Offbeat Comedies

details.title: The Big Lebowski
details.description: Jeffrey 'The Dude' Lebowski, a Los Angeles slacker who only wants to bowl and drink White Russians, is mistaken for another Jeffrey Lebowski, a wheelchair-bound millionaire, and finds himself dragged into a strange series of events involving nihilists, adult film producers, ferrets, errant toes, and large sums of money.

title: The Big One
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Social Satires

details.title: The Big One
details.description: The Big One is an investigative documentary from director Michael Moore who goes around the country asking why big American corporations produce their product abroad where labor is cheaper while so many Americans are unemployed, losing their jobs, and would happily be hired by such companies as Nike.

title: The Big Sleep
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Film Noirs

details.title: The Big Sleep
details.description: Private Investigator Philip Marlowe is hired by wealthy General Sternwood regarding a matter involving his youngest daughter Carmen. Before the complex case is over, Marlowe sees murder, blackmail, deception, and what might be love.

title: The Big Squeeze
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > Tragic Icons

details.title: The Big Squeeze
details.description: The computer game chain GameStop created so much chaos in the stock market that it forced large hedge funds to their knees. How could it happen? Here we follow different people who were brought together during 2020 because of their interest in GameStop's future. Some had invested in the chain's stock, others wondered about it. While the chain's employees trusted that the company would pay their salaries at a time when millions of people went bankrupt and became unemployed.

title: The Birdcage
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Social Satires

details.title: The Birdcage
details.description: A gay cabaret owner and his drag queen partner agree to put up a false heterosexual front so that their son can introduce them to his fiancée's conservative parents.

title: The Birds
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Small Town Thrillers

details.title: The Birds
details.description: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

title: The Blob
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Small Town Terrors

details.title: The Blob
details.description: In Arborville, California, three high school students try to protect their hometown from a gelatinous alien life form that engulfs everything it touches.

title: The Blue Angel, The (Blaue Engel,
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > War Romances & Classic Dramas > War Romances

details.title: The Blue Angel, The (Blaue Engel,
details.description: Remake of Josef von Sternberg's 1930 classic.

title: The Blues Brothers
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Road Comedies

details.title: The Blues Brothers
details.description: Jake Blues, just released from prison, puts his old band back together to save the Catholic home where he and his brother Elwood were raised.

title: The Body Snatcher
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Romance, Drama & Fantasy > Gothic Romances

details.title: The Body Snatcher
details.description: Edinburgh, 1831. Among those who undertake the illegal trade of grave robbery is Gray, ostensibly a cab driver. Formerly a medical student convicted of grave robbery, Gray holds a grudge against Dr. MacFarlane who had escaped detection and punishment.

title: The Boys of St. Vincent
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Family Dramas

details.title: The Boys of St. Vincent
details.description: The true story of boys being sexually abused at their orphanage, run by a religious community in Newfoundland.

title: The Brady Bunch Movie
full_path: Comedy, Adventure & Cultural Odyssey > Comedy & Adventure Films > Fish Out Of Water Comedies > Cultural Misadventures

details.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
details.description: The original '70s TV family is now placed in the 1990s, where they're even more square and out of place than ever.

title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
full_path: Drama, Justice & Social Commentary > Classic Drama & Social Justice > Classic Tragedies

details.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
details.description: The classic story of English POWs in Burma forced to build a bridge to aid the war effort of their Japanese captors. British and American intelligence officers conspire to blow up the structure, but Col. Nicholson, the commander who supervised the bridge's construction, has acquired a sense of pride in his creation and tries to foil their plans.

title: The Bridges of Madison County
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Crises

details.title: The Bridges of Madison County
details.description: Photographer Robert Kincaid wanders into the life of housewife Francesca Johnson for four days in the 1960s.

title: The Brothers McMullen
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Quarter Life Crises

details.title: The Brothers McMullen
details.description: Deals with the lives of the three Irish Catholic McMullen brothers from Long Island, New York, over three months, as they grapple with basic ideas and values — love, sex, marriage, religion and family — in the 1990s.

title: The Browning Version
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Crises

details.title: The Browning Version
details.description: Andrew Crocker-Harris is an embittered and disliked teacher of Greek and Latin at a British prep school. After nearly 20 years of service, he is being forced to retire for 'health reasons', and perhaps may not even be given a pension. The boys regard him as a Hitler, with some justification. His unfaithful wife Laura tries to hurt him in any way she can. Andrew must come to terms with his failed life and at least regain his own self-esteem.

title: The Butcher Boy
full_path: Comedy, Satire & Romantic Escapades > Classic Slapstick Comedies > Slapstick Comedies

details.title: The Butcher Boy
details.description: Customers and clerks frolic in a general store. Roscoe walks out of the freezer wearing a fur coat, then does some clever cleaver tossing. In Buster's film debut he buys a pail of molasses.

title: The Cable Guy
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Dark Comedies

details.title: The Cable Guy
details.description: When recently single Steven moves into his new apartment, cable guy Chip comes to hook him up—and doesn't let go. Initially, Chip is just overzealous in his desire to be Steven's pal, but when Steven tries to end the 'friendship', Chip shows his dark side. He begins stalking Steven, who's left to fend for himself because no one else can believe Chip's capable of such behaviour.

title: The Candidate
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Political Satires

details.title: The Candidate
details.description: Bill McKay is a candidate for the U.S. Senate from California. He has no hope of winning, so he is willing to tweak the establishment.

title: The Celluloid Closet
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Coming-Of-Age Dramas & Comedies > Queer Dramas

details.title: The Celluloid Closet
details.description: Exuberant, eye-opening movie that serves up a dazzling hundred-year history of the role of gay men and lesbians have had on the silver screen. Film contains fabulous footage from 120 films showing the changing face of cinema sexuality, from cruel stereotypes to covert love to the activist triumphs of the 1990s.

title: The Cement Garden
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, Family & Mortality > Dysfunctional Family Dramas

details.title: The Cement Garden
details.description: After the death of her husband, the mother of Julie, Jack, Sue and Tom begins to suffer from a mysterious illness. Aware that she is going to have to go into hospital she opens a bank account for the children, so that they can be financially self-sufficient and will be able to avoid being taken into care by the authorities. Unfortunately she also dies and Julie and Jack (the older, teenage children) decide to hide her body in the basement so that they can have free reign of their household. Soon Tom has taken to dressing as a girl whilst Sue has become increasingly reticent, confiding only to her diary, meanwhile Jack and Julie sense an attraction developing for each other. However Julie's new beau, Derek, threatens to unearth the many dark secrets within this family as he becomes increasingly suspicious of Jack.

title: The Chamber
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Survival Films

details.title: The Chamber
details.description: A special ops unit commandeer a commercial research vessel and its submersible to locate a mysterious item at the bottom of the Yellow Sea. When an explosion causes the sub to overturn and take on water, the crew begins to understand that not all of them will escape and a fight for survival ensues.

title: The City of Lost Children
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Futuristic Uprisings

details.title: The City of Lost Children
details.description: A scientist in a surrealist society kidnaps children to steal their dreams, hoping that they slow his aging process.

title: The Client
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: The Client
details.description: A street-wise kid, Mark Sway, sees the suicide of Jerome Clifford, a prominent Louisiana lawyer, whose current client is Barry 'The Blade' Muldano, a Mafia hit-man. Before Jerome shoots himself, he tells Mark where the body of a Senator is buried. Clifford shoots himself and Mark is found at the scene, and both the FBI and the Mafia quickly realize that Mark probably knows more than he says.

title: The Convent, The (Convent
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: The Convent, The (Convent
details.description: Lucía and Ana Ma, two young postulants recently arrived at a small convent, find themselves involved in the strange events that occur there.

title: The Cook the Thief His Wife & Her Lover
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Twisted Romances

details.title: The Cook the Thief His Wife & Her Lover
details.description: The wife of an abusive criminal finds solace in the arms of a kind regular guest in her husband's restaurant.

title: The Cowboy Way
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Western Action & Comedy > Western Comedies

details.title: The Cowboy Way
details.description: Two championship rodeo partners travel to New York to find their missing friend, Nacho Salazar who went missing there.

title: The Craft
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: The Craft
details.description: A Catholic school newcomer falls in with a clique of teen witches who wield their powers against all who dare to cross them -- be they teachers, rivals or meddlesome parents.

title: The Crossing Guard
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, Family & Mortality > Mortality Dramas

details.title: The Crossing Guard
details.description: Unable to move on from the loss of his daughter, Freddy, now a shell of the person he was before, swears to kill the man responsible for her death.

title: The Crow
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: The Crow
details.description: Exactly one year after young rock guitarist Eric Draven and his fiancée are brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals, Draven, watched over by a hypnotic crow, returns from the grave to exact revenge.

title: The Crow: City of Angels
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: The Crow: City of Angels
details.description: A murder victim is brought back to life by a mysterious crow. With the help of a beautiful woman, he exacts revenge on his killers – only to realize his enemy has discovered the one weakness that can destroy him forever.

title: The Crucible
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Redemption Dramas > Haunted Past Redeemers

details.title: The Crucible
details.description: Marni, a policewoman, is tasked to investigate the accusation of child molestation, allegedly done by an expatriate teacher at an International School in Jakarta. As Marni goes deep in her investigation, she has to navigate the media circus and public hysteria that manipulates and corrupts the truth.

title: The Crying Game
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Thriller, Crime & Deception > Ira Thrillers

details.title: The Crying Game
details.description: Irish Republican Army member Fergus forms an unexpected bond with Jody, a kidnapped British soldier in his custody, despite the warnings of fellow IRA members Jude and Maguire. Jody makes Fergus promise he'll visit his girlfriend, Dil, in London, and when Fergus flees to the city, he seeks her out. Hounded by his former IRA colleagues, he finds himself increasingly drawn to the enigmatic, and surprising, Dil.

title: The Cure
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Unconventional Upbringings

details.title: The Cure
details.description: Erik, a loner, finds a friend in Dexter, an eleven-year-old boy with AIDS. They vow to find a cure for AIDS together and save Dexter's life in an eventful summer.

title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
details.description: A representative of an alien race that went through drastic evolution to survive its own climate change, Klaatu comes to Earth to assess whether humanity can prevent the environmental damage they have inflicted on their own planet. When barred from speaking to the United Nations, he decides humankind shall be exterminated so the planet can survive.

title: The Daytrippers
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Entanglements

details.title: The Daytrippers
details.description: Eliza D'Amico thinks her marriage to Louis is going great until she finds a mysterious love note to her husband. Concerned, she goes to her mother for advice. Eliza, her parents, her sister Jo, and Jo's boyfriend all pile into the station wagon and go to the city to confront Louis with the letter. On the way, the five explore their relations with each other and meet many interesting people.

title: The Deadly Cure
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: The Deadly Cure
details.description: When a physician discovers the cure for a deadly disease, a band of drug dealers responsible for the disease, target the physician, whose cure can make them lose money. However, the physician is also an expert martial artist and must use his skills to protect both himself and assistant from the drug dealers.

title: The Deer Hunter
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > Turbulent Liaisons

details.title: The Deer Hunter
details.description: A group of working-class friends decide to enlist in the Army during the Vietnam War and finds it to be hellish chaos -- not the noble venture they imagined. Before they left, Steven married his pregnant girlfriend -- and Michael and Nick were in love with the same woman. But all three are different men upon their return.

title: The Designated Mourner
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Social Satires

details.title: The Designated Mourner
details.description: Jack and Judy are husband and wife, and Howard is Judy's father. They live in some fictional undemocratic and repressive country, and tell us a story about their lives, mostly from Jack's point of view.

title: The Devil's Advocate
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: The Devil's Advocate
details.description: Aspiring Florida defense lawyer Kevin Lomax accepts a job at a New York law firm. With the stakes getting higher every case, Kevin quickly learns that his boss has something far more evil planned.

title: The Devil's Own
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Thriller, Crime & Deception > Ira Thrillers

details.title: The Devil's Own
details.description: Frankie McGuire, one of the IRA's deadliest assassins, draws an American family into the crossfire of terrorism. But when he is sent to the U.S. to buy weapons, Frankie is housed with the family of Tom O'Meara, a New York cop who knows nothing about Frankie's real identity. Their surprising friendship, and Tom's growing suspicions, forces Frankie to choose between the promise of peace or a lifetime of murder.

title: The Die xue shuang xiong (Killer,
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > Crime Dramas

details.title: The Die xue shuang xiong (Killer,
details.description: Mob assassin Jeffrey is no ordinary hired gun; the best in his business, he views his chosen profession as a calling rather than simply a job. So, when beautiful nightclub chanteuse Jennie is blinded in the crossfire of his most recent hit, Jeffrey chooses to retire after one last job to pay for his unintended victim's sight-restoring operation. But when Jeffrey is double-crossed, he reluctantly joins forces with a rogue policeman to make things right.

title: The Doom Generation
full_path: Darkness, Fear & Human Conflict > Horror & Teen Thrillers > Teen Slasher Films

details.title: The Doom Generation
details.description: Jordan White and Amy Blue, two troubled teens, pick up an adolescent drifter, Xavier Red. Together, the threesome embarks on a sex- and violence-filled journey through a United States of psychos and quickie marts.

title: The Doors
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Music Biopics

details.title: The Doors
details.description: The story of the famous and influential 1960s rock band and its lead singer and composer, Jim Morrison.

title: The Double vie de Véronique, La (Double Life of Veronique,
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Crises

details.title: The Double vie de Véronique, La (Double Life of Veronique,
details.description: Véronique is a beautiful young French woman who aspires to be a renowned singer; Weronika lives in Poland, has a similar career goal and looks identical to Véronique, though the two are not related. The film follows both women as they contend with the ups and downs of their individual lives, with Véronique embarking on an unusual romance with Alexandre Fabbri, a puppeteer who may be able to help her with her existential issues.

title: The Edge
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Comedy & Adventure > Macau Thrillers

details.title: The Edge
details.description: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

title: The Empire Strikes Back
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: The Empire Strikes Back
details.description: The epic saga continues as Luke Skywalker, in hopes of defeating the evil Galactic Empire, learns the ways of the Jedi from aging master Yoda. But Darth Vader is more determined than ever to capture Luke. Meanwhile, rebel leader Princess Leia, cocky Han Solo, Chewbacca, and droids C-3PO and R2-D2 are thrown into various stages of capture, betrayal and despair.

title: The Endless Summer 2
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Documentary, Mystery & Adventure > Documentaries

details.title: The Endless Summer 2
details.description: Bruce Brown, king of surfing documentaries, returns after nearly thirty years to trace the steps of two young surfers to top surfing spots around the world. Along the way we see many of the people and locales Bruce visited during the filming of Endless Summer (1966).

title: The English Patient
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Western & Drama > Frontier Epics

details.title: The English Patient
details.description: In the 1930s, Count Almásy is a Hungarian map maker employed by the Royal Geographical Society to chart the vast expanses of the Sahara Desert along with several other prominent explorers. As World War II unfolds, Almásy enters into a world of love, betrayal, and politics.

title: The Englishman Who Went Up a Hill, But Came Down a Mountain
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Uplifting Dramedies

details.title: The Englishman Who Went Up a Hill, But Came Down a Mountain
details.description: When an English cartographer arrives in Wales to tell the residents of the Welsh village of Ffynnon Garw  that their 'mountain' is only a hill, the offended community sets out to remedy the situation.

title: The Evening Star
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Relationships & Family > Southern Dramas

details.title: The Evening Star
details.description: Continuing the story of Aurora Greenway in her latter years. After the death of her daughter, Aurora struggled to keep her family together, but has one grandson in jail, a rebellious granddaughter, and another grandson living just above the poverty line.

title: The Fan
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > Turbulent Liaisons

details.title: The Fan
details.description: Lord Windermere appears to all – including his young wife Margaret – to be the perfect husband. The couple's happy marriage is placed at risk when he starts paying visits to a mysterious beautiful newcomer, Mrs. Erylnne, who is determined to make her entry into London's high society. Worse, the secret gets back to Margaret that Windermere has been giving Mrs. Erylnne large sums of money.

title: The Fear
full_path: Darkness, Fear & Human Conflict > Horror & Teen Thrillers > Teen Slasher Films

details.title: The Fear
details.description: Richard, a college student who has decided to focus his attention on the study of fear, invites a group of friends up to his family's secluded mountain cabin for the weekend. Soon, a lifelike, wooden carving of a man begins stalking and killing them.

title: The Fifth Element
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: The Fifth Element
details.description: In 2257, a taxi driver is unintentionally given the task of saving a young girl who is part of the key that will ensure the survival of humanity.

title: The Firm
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Betrayals & Deceptions

details.title: The Firm
details.description: Mitch McDeere is a young man with a promising future in Law. About to sit his Bar exam, he is approached by 'The Firm' and made an offer he doesn't refuse. Seduced by the money and gifts showered on him, he is totally oblivious to the more sinister side of his company. Then, two Associates are murdered. The FBI contact him, asking him for information and suddenly his life is ruined. He has a choice - work with the FBI, or stay with the Firm. Either way he will lose his life as he knows it. Mitch figures the only way out is to follow his own plan...

title: The First Wives Club
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: The First Wives Club
details.description: After years of helping their hubbies climb the ladder of success, three mid-life Manhattanites have been dumped for a newer, curvier model. But the trio is determined to turn their pain into gain. They come up with a cleverly devious plan to hit their exes where it really hurts - in the wallet!

title: The Flintstones
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Whimsical Escapades

details.title: The Flintstones
details.description: Modern Stone Age family the Flintstones hit the big screen in this live-action version of the classic cartoon. Fred helps Barney adopt a child. Barney sees an opportunity to repay him when Slate Mining tests its employees to find a new executive. But no good deed goes unpunished.

title: The Flower of My Secret, The (Flor de mi secreto
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Crises

details.title: The Flower of My Secret, The (Flor de mi secreto
details.description: Middle-aged romance author Leo writes under a pseudonym, since she despises her own work. At home, her husband, who works overseas, is distant both physically and emotionally. As she reevaluates her life and writing, Leo is led to an unexpected relationship with Ángel, a sensitive newspaper editor.

title: The Fog
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Small Town Terrors

details.title: The Fog
details.description: Trapped within an eerie mist, the residents of Antonio Bay have become the unwitting victims of a horrifying vengeance. One hundred years earlier, a ship carrying lepers was purposely lured onto the rocky coastline and sank, drowning all aboard. Now they're back – long-dead mariners who've waited a century for their revenge.

title: The Fox and the Hound
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Small Town Dramas > Quirky Communities

details.title: The Fox and the Hound
details.description: When a feisty little fox named Tod is adopted into a farm family, he quickly becomes friends with a fun and adorable hound puppy named Copper. Life is full of hilarious adventures until Copper is expected to take on his role as a hunting dog -- and the object of his search is his best friend!

title: The Frighteners
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: The Frighteners
details.description: Once an architect, Frank Bannister now passes himself off as an exorcist of evil spirits. To bolster his facade, he claims his "special" gift is the result of a car accident that killed his wife. But what he does not count on is more people dying in the small town where he lives. As he tries to piece together the supernatural mystery of these killings, he falls in love with the wife of one of the victims and deals with a crazy FBI agent.

title: The Fugitive
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Historical Dramas

details.title: The Fugitive
details.description: Anti-Catholic and anti-cleric policies in the Mexican state of Tabasco lead the revolutionary government to persecute the state's last remaining priest.

title: The Full Monty
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Uplifting Dramedies

details.title: The Full Monty
details.description: Sheffield, England. Gaz, a jobless steelworker in need of quick cash persuades his mates to bare it all in a one-night-only strip show.

title: The Funeral
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Gangster Films

details.title: The Funeral
details.description: After the funeral of one of their own, a criminal family decides to embark on an emotionally unnerving journey in an attempt to exact bloody revenge.

title: The Game
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Mind Games Manipulations

details.title: The Game
details.description: In honor of his birthday, San Francisco banker Nicholas Van Orton, a financial genius and a cold-hearted loner, receives an unusual present from his younger brother, Conrad: a gift certificate to play a unique kind of game. In nary a nanosecond, Nicholas finds himself consumed by a dangerous set of ever-changing rules, unable to distinguish where the charade ends and reality begins.

title: The Garden of Finzi-Contini, The (Giardino dei Finzi-Contini
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Historical Dramas

details.title: The Garden of Finzi-Contini, The (Giardino dei Finzi-Contini
details.description: In 1930s Italy, a wealthy Jewish family tries to maintain their privileged lifestyle, hosting friends for tennis and parties at their villa. As anti-Semitism intensifies under Fascism, they must ultimately face the horrors of the Holocaust.

title: The Gay Divorcee
full_path: Comedy, Satire & Romantic Escapades > Comedy & Romance Classics > Screwball Comedies

details.title: The Gay Divorcee
details.description: Seeking a divorce from her absentee husband, Mimi Glossop travels to an English seaside resort. There she falls in love with dancer Guy Holden, whom she later mistakes for the corespondent her lawyer hired.

title: The Getaway
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Thriller & Adventure Films > Disaster Thrillers

details.title: The Getaway
details.description: A recently released ex-convict and his loyal wife go on the run after a heist goes wrong.

title: The Ghost and Mrs. Muir
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Romance, Drama & Fantasy > Gothic Romances

details.title: The Ghost and Mrs. Muir
details.description: In 1900, young widow Lucy Muir learns that her seaside cottage is haunted and forms a unique relationship with the ghost.

title: The Ghost and the Darkness
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Expedition Adventures

details.title: The Ghost and the Darkness
details.description: Sir Robert Beaumont is behind schedule on a railroad in Africa. Enlisting noted engineer John Henry Patterson to right the ship, Beaumont expects results. Everything seems great until the crew discovers the mutilated corpse of the project's foreman, seemingly killed by a lion. After several more attacks, Patterson calls in famed hunter Charles Remington, who has finally met his match in the bloodthirsty lions.

title: The Glimmer Man
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: The Glimmer Man
details.description: A former government operative renowned for his stealth, Jack Cole is now a Los Angeles police detective. When a series of horrible murders occurs in the metro area, Cole is assigned to the case, along with tough-talking fellow cop Jim Campbell. Although the two men clash, they gradually become effective partners as they uncover a conspiracy linked to the killings, which also involves terrorism and organized crime.

title: The Godfather
