full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Gangster Films

details.title: The Godfather
details.description: Spanning the years 1945 to 1955, a chronicle of the fictional Italian-American Corleone crime family. When organized crime family patriarch, Vito Corleone barely survives an attempt on his life, his youngest son, Michael steps in to take care of the would-be killers, launching a campaign of bloody revenge.

title: The Godfather: Part II
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Gangster Films

details.title: The Godfather: Part II
details.description: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.

title: The Good, The Bad and The Ugly
full_path: Frontier, Exploration & American Odyssey > Western Action & Adventure > Spaghetti Westerns

details.title: The Good, The Bad and The Ugly
details.description: While the Civil War rages on between the Union and the Confederacy, three men – a quiet loner, a ruthless hitman, and a Mexican bandit – comb the American Southwest in search of a strongbox containing $200,000 in stolen gold.

title: The Graduate
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Suburban Dramas

details.title: The Graduate
details.description: A disillusioned college graduate finds himself torn between his older lover and her daughter.

title: The Grass Harp
full_path: Drama, Family & Social Heritage > Southern Gothic & Family Drama > Southern Gothics

details.title: The Grass Harp
details.description: Based on the novel by Truman Capote, this often-witty coming-of-age drama looks at a young man growing up with an unusual family in the Deep South in the 1940s. Becoming an orphan in 1935, Collin moves to his dad's cousins Verena and Dolly. Verena is a rich, bossy businesswoman. Dolly, Collin and the maid revolt, moving to a tree house.

title: The Great Dictator
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Political Satires

details.title: The Great Dictator
details.description: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

title: The Great Escape
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > War Heroes & Legends

details.title: The Great Escape
details.description: The Nazis, exasperated at the number of escapes from their prison camps by a relatively small number of Allied prisoners, relocate them to a high-security 'escape-proof' camp to sit out the remainder of the war. Undaunted, the prisoners plan one of the most ambitious escape attempts of World War II. Based on a true story.

title: The Great Race
full_path: Comedy, Satire & Romantic Escapades > Comedy & Romance Classics > Screwball Comedies

details.title: The Great Race
details.description: Professional daredevil and white-suited hero, The Great Leslie, convinces turn-of-the-century auto makers that a race from New York to Paris (westward across America, the Bering Straight and Russia) will help to promote automobile sales. Leslie's arch-rival, the mustached and black-attired Professor Fate vows to beat Leslie to the finish line in a car of Fate's own invention.

title: The Great White Hype
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Sports Comedies

details.title: The Great White Hype
details.description: When the champ's promoter, Rev. Sultan, decides something new is needed to boost the marketability of the boxing matches, he searches and finds the only man to ever beat the champ. The problem is that he isn't a boxer anymore and he's white. However, once Rev. Sultan convinces him to fight, he goes into heavy training while the confident champ takes it easy and falls out of shape.

title: The Grifters
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > Crime Dramas

details.title: The Grifters
details.description: A small-time conman has his loyalties torn between his estranged mother and his new girlfriend, both of whom are high-stakes grifters with their own angles to play.

title: The Haunted World of Edward D. Wood Jr.
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy Horror Comedies & Adventure > Campy Horror Comedies

details.title: The Haunted World of Edward D. Wood Jr.
details.description: Often called the worst director in the history of cinema, Ed Wood is nevertheless a beloved figure among cult-film aficionados for his oddball productions. This documentary takes a look back at Wood's unique career at the margins of 1950s Hollywood, speaking to those who loved him and hated him. Bela Lugosi Jr. discusses his father's work in the abysmal "Plan 9 From Outer Space," while a Baptist reverend recalls how he was tricked into financing the film.

title: The Horse Whisperer
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Rural Dramas

details.title: The Horse Whisperer
details.description: The mother of a severely traumatized daughter enlists the aid of a unique horse trainer to help the girl's equally injured horse.

title: The Horseman on the Roof, The (Hussard sur le toit
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Western & Drama > Historical Epics

details.title: The Horseman on the Roof, The (Hussard sur le toit
details.description: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

title: The Hour of the Pig
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > Courtroom Dramas

details.title: The Hour of the Pig
details.description: In medieval France, young lawyer Richard Courtois leaves Paris for the simpler life in the country. However, he is soon drawn into amorous and political intrigues. At the same time, he is pushed to defend a pig, owned by the mysterious gypsy Samira. The pig has been arrested for the murder of a young boy.

title: The House of Yes
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, Family & Mortality > Dysfunctional Family Dramas

details.title: The House of Yes
details.description: Jackie-O is anxiously awaiting the visit of her brother home for Thanksgiving, but isn't expecting him to bring a friend — and she's even more shocked to learn that this friend is his fiance. It soon becomes clear that her obsession with Jackie Kennedy is nothing compared to her obsession with her brother, and she isn't the only member of the family with problems.

title: The House of the Spirits
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The House of the Spirits
details.description: A rancher, his clairvoyant wife and their family face turbulent years in South America.

title: The Howling
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Haunted Houses

details.title: The Howling
details.description: After a bizarre and near fatal encounter with a serial killer, a newswoman is sent to a rehabilitation center whose inhabitants may not be what they seem.

title: The Hudsucker Proxy
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Offbeat Satires

details.title: The Hudsucker Proxy
details.description: A naive business graduate is installed as president of a manufacturing company as part of a stock scam.

title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > Turbulent Liaisons

details.title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame
details.description: Isolated bell-ringer Quasimodo wishes to leave Notre Dame tower against the wishes of Judge Claude Frollo, his stern guardian and Paris' strait-laced Minister of Justice. His first venture to the outside world finds him Esmeralda, a kind-hearted and fearless Romani woman who openly stands up to Frollo's tyranny.

title: The Hunt for Red October
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Cat-And-Mouse Thrillers

details.title: The Hunt for Red October
details.description: A new technologically-superior Soviet nuclear sub, the Red October, is heading for the U.S. coast under the command of Captain Marko Ramius. The American government thinks Ramius is planning to attack. Lone CIA analyst Jack Ryan has a different idea: he thinks Ramius is planning to defect, but he has only a few hours to find him and prove it - because the entire Russian naval and air commands are trying to find Ramius, too. The hunt is on!

title: The Hunted
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Action Thrillers

details.title: The Hunted
details.description: Chasing their dream of landing their own hunting show, Jake and Stevie head to the dense, secluded mountains of West Virginia. Equipped with only their bow and camera, they have just three days to kill a monster buck big enough to grab the attention of the network...and they've found him. But the sun has set, and they realize they're not alone.

title: The Ice Storm
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Suburban Dramas

details.title: The Ice Storm
details.description: In the weekend after thanksgiving 1973 the Hood family is skidding out of control. Then an ice storm hits, the worst in a century.

title: The Indian in the Cupboard
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Indian in the Cupboard
details.description: A nine-year-old boy gets a plastic Indian and a cupboard for his birthday and finds himself involved in adventure when the Indian comes to life and befriends him.

title: The Innocent
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Corporate Thrillers

details.title: The Innocent
details.description: A young engineer is sent to post-WWII Berlin to help the Americans in spying on the Russians. In a time and place where discretion is still a man’s best friend, he falls in love with a mysterious woman who will take him on the dark side of evil.

title: The Innocents
full_path: Reality, Documentary & Social Commentary > Experimental Documentary & Technology Films > Experimental Documentaries

details.title: The Innocents
details.description: Part of Bill Viola’s Transfiguration series, The Innocents explores the presence of the dead in the world of the living. The video documents a boy and a girl who slowly approach out of the darkness and into the light. Shown on separate screens, they break through what is, at first, an invisible threshold of water, suggestive of a passage from the spiritual world into a physical plane of existence. Once incarnate, however, all beings realize that their presence is finite, and so the figures eventually turn away from material existence to return from whence they came.

title: The Inspector General
full_path: Comedy, Satire & Romantic Escapades > Comedy, Dark Comedy & Satire > Comedy Capers

details.title: The Inspector General
details.description: An illiterate stooge in a traveling medicine show wanders into a strange town and is picked up on a vagrancy charge. The town's corrupt officials mistake him for the inspector general whom they think is traveling in disguise. Fearing he will discover they've been pocketing tax money, they make several bungled attempts to kill him.

title: The Island of Dr. Moreau
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Futuristic Uprisings

details.title: The Island of Dr. Moreau
details.description: A ship-wrecked man floats ashore on an island in the Pacific Ocean. The island is inhabited by a scientist, Dr. Moreau, who in an experiment has turned beasts into human beings.

title: The Jackal
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Cat-And-Mouse Thrillers

details.title: The Jackal
details.description: Hired by a powerful member of the Russian mafia to avenge an FBI sting that left his brother dead, a psychopathic hitman known only as The Jackal proves an elusive target for the people charged with the task of bringing him down: a deputy FBI director, a Russian MVK Major,  and a jailed IRA terrorist who can recognize him.

title: The Jerky Boys
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Gangland Satires

details.title: The Jerky Boys
details.description: When two unemployed telephone pranksters decide to use their vocal "talents" to impersonate a Chicago mob boss and curry favor with organized crime in New York, the trouble begins. It isn't long before Johnny and Kamal (the "Jerky Boys" of crank call fame) are wanted by the local mafia, the police, and their neighbor.

title: The Journey of August King
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Historical Dramas

details.title: The Journey of August King
details.description: The Journey of August King is a multi-dimensional drama about a North Carolina farmer in 1815. August King, a widower, is on his way home as he does every year after selling his produce and purchasing the stock and goods he will need to survive the winter. On his journey, he comes upon a run-away slave, a young woman about 19 and August King must decide to violate the law and help this slave to freedom or else leave her to be hunted down and, ultimately, returned to her slave owner.

title: The Joy Luck Club
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Family Dramas

details.title: The Joy Luck Club
details.description: Through a series of flashbacks, four Chinese women born in America and their respective mothers born in feudal China explore their pasts.

title: The Jungle Book
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy, Comedy & Classic > Animated Classics

details.title: The Jungle Book
details.description: The boy Mowgli makes his way to the man-village with Bagheera, the wise panther. Along the way he meets jazzy King Louie, the hypnotic snake Kaa and the lovable, happy-go-lucky bear Baloo, who teaches Mowgli "The Bare Necessities" of life and the true meaning of friendship.

title: The Juror
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime & Drama Thrillers > Courtroom Dramas

details.title: The Juror
details.description: With his gangster boss on trial for murder, a mob thug known as "the Teacher" tells Annie Laird she must talk her fellow jurors into a not-guilty verdict, implying that he'll kill her son Oliver if she fails. She manages to do this, but, when it becomes clear that the mobsters might want to silence her for good, she sends Oliver abroad and tries to gather evidence of the plot against her, setting up a final showdown.

title: The Killing Fields
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > War Heroes & Legends

details.title: The Killing Fields
details.description: New York Times reporter Sydney Schanberg is on assignment covering the Cambodian Civil War, with the help of local interpreter Dith Pran and American photojournalist Al Rockoff. When the U.S. Army pulls out amid escalating violence, Schanberg makes exit arrangements for Pran and his family. Pran, however, tells Schanberg he intends to stay in Cambodia to help cover the unfolding story — a decision he may regret as the Khmer Rouge rebels move in.

title: The Last Klezmer: Leopold Kozlowski, His Life and Music
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Military Drama & Action > Survival Dramas

details.title: The Last Klezmer: Leopold Kozlowski, His Life and Music
details.description: Years after the Holocaust, survivor Leopold Kozlowski lives in Poland, and is one of the few remaining experts in the Klezmer tradition of music, one played predominantly by the Eastern European Jewish community. Director Yael Strom follows Kozlowski as he travels back to his village in the Ukraine, where he visits his father's grave and speaks about his relatives who perished in the Holocaust. Strom honors Kozlowski's life as a teacher, musician and survivor.

title: The Last Supper
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Serial Killer Thrillers

details.title: The Last Supper
details.description: A plastic surgeon who excels at his job hides a dark secret. After finally succumbing to his desire to taste human flesh, the surgeon soon finds himself addicted to the taste of his patients' skin, which leads him to discover further culinary delights at a seedy restaurant with some highly dubious special dishes. Murder and mayhem ensue as the demented doctor continues to find new and gruesome ways to satisfy his appetite.

title: The Last Time I Committed Suicide
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Artistic Visionaries

details.title: The Last Time I Committed Suicide
details.description: Neal Cassady is living the beat life during the 1940s, working at The Tire Yard and philandering around town. However, he has visions of a happy life with kids and a white picket fence. When his girlfried, Joan, tries to kill herself he gets scared and runs away. But when Joan reappears will he take the chance at that happiness, or will he turn his back on it?

title: The Last Time I Saw Paris
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > War Romances & Classic Dramas > War Romances

details.title: The Last Time I Saw Paris
details.description: Reporter Charles Wills, in Paris to cover the end of World War II, falls for the beautiful Helen Ellswirth following a brief flirtation with her sister, Marion. After he and Helen marry, Charles pursues his novelistic ambition while supporting his new bride with a deadening job at a newspaper wire service. But when an old investment suddenly makes the family wealthy, their marriage begins to unravel — until a sudden tragedy changes everything.

title: The Last of the Mohicans
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Western & Drama > Historical Epics

details.title: The Last of the Mohicans
details.description: In war-torn colonial America, in the midst of a bloody battle between British, the French and Native American allies, the aristocratic daughter of a British Colonel and her party are captured by a group of Huron warriors. Fortunately, a group of three Mohican trappers comes to their rescue.

title: The Lawnmower Man
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Sci-Fi, Action & Comedy > Cyberpunk Films > Virtual Rebels

details.title: The Lawnmower Man
details.description: A simple man is turned into a genius through the application of computer science.

title: The Lay of the Land
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Coming-Of-Age Dramas & Comedies > Queer Dramas

details.title: The Lay of the Land
details.description: A menacing man with a history of gay-bashing enters a smoky bar and strikes up a conversation with a drag queen in this dark short by Fraser MacDonald, which explores violence, homophobia and masculinity.

title: The Leading Man
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Space Comedies

details.title: The Leading Man
details.description: When a self-absorbed movie star discovers that his co-star/man in the chair is an actual agent, he's forced to swallow his pride and accept that action stars aren’t really action heroes…while trying to save the world.

title: The Line King: Al Hirschfeld
full_path: Reality, Documentary & Social Commentary > Documentary & Film History > Behind-The-Scenes Documentaries

details.title: The Line King: Al Hirschfeld
details.description: The childhood, adolescence, and incredible adult years of Al Hirschfeld, celebrated creator of thousands of line drawings of famous people - many in the entertainment industry - over a span of more than sixty years. He is still drawing in his nineties. His interesting domestic life, political, and cultural views are highlights. In addition, he talks about himself a bit - seriously and lightly.(At one point he he claims that his only form of exercise has been to live in his Manhattan townhouse: stairs). He drives his car around Manhattan - an adventure in itself. Brief interviews with, and reminiscences of many friends and associates.

title: The Lion King
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy, Comedy & Classic > Animated Classics

details.title: The Lion King
details.description: Young lion prince Simba, eager to one day become king of the Pride Lands, grows up under the watchful eye of his father Mufasa; all the while his villainous uncle Scar conspires to take the throne for himself. Amid betrayal and tragedy, Simba must confront his past and find his rightful place in the Circle of Life.

title: The Little Princess
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Formative Years Portraits

details.title: The Little Princess
details.description: A little girl goes in search of her father who is reported missing by the military during the Second Boer War.

title: The Little Rascals
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Little Rascals
details.description: When nine-year-old Alfalfa falls for Darla, his "He-Man-Woman-Hating" friends attempt to sabotage their relationship.

title: The Locusts
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Twisted Romances

details.title: The Locusts
details.description: Delilah Potts has always had her choice of men to work her ranch and fill her bed. But from the moment Clay Hewitt, a handsome drifter with a mysterious past, arrives at her door, Delilah knows that her life will never be the same. And when he spurns her affections, she unleashes a torrent of forbidden passions and deadly secrets that will prove to Clay that the only thing darker and more dangerous than the past he's escaping... is the one he's about to discover.

title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Assassination Thrillers

details.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
details.description: Samantha Caine is a small-town schoolteacher and mom with no memory of her life before washing up on a beach eight years ago. After a car accident and a violent home invasion trigger flashes of her past, she discovers she used to be a deadly CIA assassin. Teaming up with a wisecracking private investigator, Samantha must return to her old ways to take down the people who tried to erase her.

title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Expedition Adventures

details.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
details.description: Four years after Jurassic Park's genetically bred dinosaurs ran amok, multimillionaire John Hammond shocks chaos theorist Ian Malcolm by revealing that he has been breeding more beasties at a secret location. Malcolm, his paleontologist ladylove and a wildlife videographer join an expedition to document the lethal lizards' natural behavior in this action-packed thriller.

title: The Love Bug
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Family Adventures > Whimsical Escapades

details.title: The Love Bug
details.description: The inimitable VW Beetle is losing all his races and destined for the scrap heap until mechanic Hank takes him over and gives him a new lease of life. Soon, Herbie is winning again, to the fury of his previous owner, who builds a menacing black bug to challenge Herbie to the ultimate race.

title: The Madness of King George
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > Tragic Icons

details.title: The Madness of King George
details.description: Aging King George III of England is exhibiting signs of madness, a problem little understood in 1788. As the monarch alternates between bouts of confusion and near-violent outbursts of temper, his hapless doctors attempt the ineffectual cures of the day. Meanwhile, Queen Charlotte and Prime Minister William Pitt the Younger attempt to prevent the king's political enemies, led by the Prince of Wales, from usurping the throne.

title: The Magic Hour
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Coming-Of-Age Dramas & Comedies > Queer Dramas

details.title: The Magic Hour
details.description: Compilation of five disability-themed short films, made by a group of disabled British directors.

title: The Magnificent Seven
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Western Action & Comedy > Gunslinger Westerns

details.title: The Magnificent Seven
details.description: Looking to mine for gold, greedy industrialist Bartholomew Bogue seizes control of the Old West town of Rose Creek. With their lives in jeopardy, Emma Cullen and other desperate residents turn to bounty hunter Sam Chisolm for help. Chisolm recruits an eclectic group of gunslingers to take on Bogue and his ruthless henchmen. With a deadly showdown on the horizon, the seven mercenaries soon find themselves fighting for more than just money once the bullets start to fly.

title: The Maltese Falcon
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Film Noirs

details.title: The Maltese Falcon
details.description: A lovely dame with dangerous lies employs the services of a private detective, who is quickly caught up in the mystery and intrigue of a statuette known as the Maltese Falcon.

title: The Man Who Knew Too Little
full_path: Comedy, Adventure & Cultural Odyssey > Comedy & Adventure Films > Fish Out Of Water Comedies > Cultural Misadventures

details.title: The Man Who Knew Too Little
details.description: An American gets a ticket for an audience participation game in London, then gets involved in a case of mistaken identity. As an international plot unravels around him, he thinks it's all part of the act.

title: The Man Who Would Be King
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Deceptive Liaisons

details.title: The Man Who Would Be King
details.description: Tired of life as soldiers, Peachy Carnehan and Danny Dravot travel to the isolated land of Kafiristan, where they are ultimately embraced by the people and revered as rulers. After a series of misunderstandings, the natives come to believe that Dravot is a god, but he and Carnehan can't keep up their deception forever.

title: The Man Without a Face
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Thriller, Crime & Deception > Deception Thrillers

details.title: The Man Without a Face
details.description: A young man is wrongly accused of a brutal murder, is tried and sentenced to death. En route to the prison there is a major train crash and his guards are killed along with an anonymous traveller in the same compartment. He swaps his personal belongings with the dead man and escapes but things don't quite go to plan.

title: The Man in the Iron Mask
full_path: Heroic Quests & Legendary Adventures > Historical Adventure & Swashbuckler Films > Musketeer Films

details.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
details.description: Years have passed since the Three Musketeers, Aramis, Athos and Porthos, have fought together with their friend, D'Artagnan. But with the tyrannical King Louis using his power to wreak havoc in the kingdom while his twin brother, Philippe, remains imprisoned, the Musketeers reunite to abduct Louis and replace him with Philippe.

title: The Manchurian Candidate
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Mind Games Manipulations

details.title: The Manchurian Candidate
details.description: Years after his squad was ambushed during the Gulf War, Major Ben Marco finds himself having terrible nightmares. He begins to doubt that his fellow squad-mate Sergeant Raymond Shaw, now a vice-presidential candidate, is the hero he remembers him being. As Marco's doubts deepen, Shaw's political power grows, and, when Marco finds a mysterious implant embedded in his back, the memory of what really happened begins to return.

title: The Mark of Zorro
full_path: Heroic Quests & Legendary Adventures > Action, Adventure & Swashbuckler > Swashbuckling Adventures

details.title: The Mark of Zorro
details.description: Don Diego Vega pretends to be an indolent fop as a cover for his true identity, the masked avenger Zorro.  Preserved by the Academy Film Archive in 2012.

title: The Mask
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: The Mask
details.description: Stanley, a meek bank employee, turns into an eccentric and maniacal green-skinned superhero who can bend reality, after wearing a wooden mask that was created by Loki, the Norse god of mischief.

title: The MatchMaker
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Romance, Comedy & Drama > Silent Romances

details.title: The MatchMaker
details.description: A young governess catches the eye of an aristocrat and romance blossoms.

title: The Mighty
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Unconventional Upbringings

details.title: The Mighty
details.description: Kevin, an intelligent guy helps out Maxwell to improve his reading skills. In return, Kevin wants Maxwell to take him out places since he is not authorized to go out. Being the social outcasts of the town, Kevin and Maxwell come to realize that they are similar to each other and accept that they are "freaks" and nothing will stop them.

title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Quirky Encounters

details.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
details.description: Rose Morgan, who still lives with her mother, is a professor of Romantic Literature who desperately longs for passion in her life. Gregory Larkin, a mathematics professor, has been burned by passionate relationships and longs for a sexless union based on friendship and respect.

title: The Neon Bible
full_path: Drama, Family & Social Heritage > Southern Gothic & Family Drama > Southern Gothics

details.title: The Neon Bible
details.description: During a train ride, a teenager recalls his upbringing in 1940s small-town Georgia and the events that have led to this point.

title: The Net
full_path: Mystery, Crime & Futuristic Realms > Sci-Fi, Mystery & Romance Thrillers > Techno Thrillers

details.title: The Net
details.description: Angela Bennett is a freelance computer systems analyst who tracks down software viruses. At night she hooks up to the internet and chats to others 'surfing the net'. While de-bugging a new high-tech game for a cyber friend, she comes across a top secret program and becomes the target of a mysterious organization who will stop at nothing to erase her identity and her existence, in order to protect the project.

title: The NeverEnding Story III
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The NeverEnding Story III
details.description: A young boy must restore order when a group of bullies steal the magical book that acts as a portal between Earth and the imaginary world of Fantasia.

title: The New Age
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: The New Age
details.description: Peter and Katherine Witner are Southern California super-yuppies with great jobs but no center to their lives. When they both lose their jobs and begin marital infidelities, their solution is to start their own business together. In order to find meaning to their empty lives, they follow various New Age gurus and other such groups. Eventually, they hit rock bottom and have to make some hard decisions.

title: The Newton Boys
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Gangster Films

details.title: The Newton Boys
details.description: The story of the Newton gang, the most successful bank robbers in history, owing to their good planning and minimal violence.

title: The Next Karate Kid
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Unconventional Upbringings

details.title: The Next Karate Kid
details.description: Mr. Miyagi decides to take Julie, a troubled teenager, under his wing after he learns that she blames herself for her parents' demise and struggles to adjust with her grandmother and fellow pupils.

title: The Next Step
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Uplifting Dramedies

details.title: The Next Step
details.description: A professional chorus line dancer is about to learn that his days of playing around with women’s hearts is headed to an abrupt end.

title: The Nightmare Before Christmas
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Comedy, Satire & Animation > Stop-Motion Comedies

details.title: The Nightmare Before Christmas
details.description: Tired of scaring humans every October 31 with the same old bag of tricks, Jack Skellington, the spindly king of Halloween Town, kidnaps Santa Claus and plans to deliver shrunken heads and other ghoulish gifts to children on Christmas morning. But as Christmas approaches, Jack's rag-doll girlfriend, Sally, tries to foil his misguided plans.

title: The Nutty Professor
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Social Climbers

details.title: The Nutty Professor
details.description: When beautiful Carla Purty joins the university faculty, genetic professor Dr. Sherman Klump grows desperate to whittle his 400-pound frame down to size and win her heart. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes 'Buddy Love', a fast-talking, pumped-up, plumped down Don Juan.

title: The Object of My Affection
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Lgbtq+ Comedy Romances & Relationships > Queer Romances

details.title: The Object of My Affection
details.description: A pregnant New York social worker begins to develop romantic feelings for her gay best friend, and decides she'd rather raise her child with him, much to the dismay of her overbearing boyfriend.

title: The Old Lady Who Walked in the Sea, The (Vieille qui marchait dans la mer
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Con Artist Comedies

details.title: The Old Lady Who Walked in the Sea, The (Vieille qui marchait dans la mer
details.description: A con artist couple takes a young, handsome petty thief under their wing, but jealousies flare when the woman develops an interest in him.

title: The Old Man and the Sea
full_path: Drama, Justice & Social Commentary > Dark Comedy & Crime Drama > Rural Tragedies

details.title: The Old Man and the Sea
details.description: Santiago is an aging, down-on-his-luck, Cuban fisherman who, after catching nothing for nearly 3 months, hooks a huge Marlin and struggles to land it far out in the Gulf Stream.

title: The Omen
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Dark Fantasies

details.title: The Omen
details.description: A diplomatic couple adopts the son of the devil without knowing it. A remake of the classic horror film of the same name from 1976.

title: The Pagemaster
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Pagemaster
details.description: Rich knows a lot about accidents. So much so, he is scared to do anything that might endanger him, like riding his bike, or climbing into his treehouse. While in an old library, he is mystically transported into the unknown world of books, and he has to try and get home again.

title: The Pallbearer
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Lgbtq+ Comedy Romances & Relationships > Quirky Romances

details.title: The Pallbearer
details.description: Aspiring architect Tom Thompson is told by mysterious Ruth Abernathy that his best friend, "Bill," has taken his own life. Except that Tom has never met Bill and neither have his incredulous friends. So when Tom foolishly agrees to give the eulogy at Bill's funeral, it sets him on a collision course with Ruth -- who is revealed to be Bill's oversexed mother -- and Julie DeMarco, the longtime crush Tom hasn't seen since they were teens.

title: The Paper
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Gangland Satires

details.title: The Paper
details.description: Henry Hackett is the workaholic editor of a New York City tabloid. He loves his job, but the long hours and low pay are leading to discontent. Also, publisher Bernie White faces financial straits, and has hatchet-man Alicia Clark—Henry's nemesis—impose unpopular cutbacks.

title: The Parent Trap
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Teenage Escapades

details.title: The Parent Trap
details.description: Hallie Parker and Annie James are identical twins who were separated at a young age due to their parents' divorce. Unbeknownst to their parents, the girls are sent to the same summer camp, where they meet, discover the truth about their relationship, and come up with a plan to switch places in an effort to reunite their mother and father.

title: The Peacemaker
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Assassination Thrillers

details.title: The Peacemaker
details.description: When a train carrying atomic warheads mysteriously crashes in the former Soviet Union, a nuclear specialist discovers the accident is really part of a plot to cover up the theft of the weapons. Assigned to help her recover the missing bombs is a crack Special Forces Colonel.

title: The People vs. Larry Flynt
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Social Satires

details.title: The People vs. Larry Flynt
details.description: Larry Flynt is the hedonistically obnoxious, but indomitable, publisher of Hustler magazine. The film recounts his struggle to make an honest living publishing his girlie magazine and how it changes into a battle to protect the freedom of speech for all people.

title: The Perez Family
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: The Perez Family
details.description: In the midst of the Mariel boat lift -- a hurried exodus of refugees from Cuba going to America -- an immigration clerk accidentally presumes that dissident Juan Raul Perez and Dorita Evita Perez are married. United by their last name and a mutual resolve to emigrate, Dorita and Juan agree to play along. But it gets complicated when the two begin falling for each other just as Juan reunites with his wife, Carmela, whom he hasn't seen in decades.

title: The Pest
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Con Artist Comedies

details.title: The Pest
details.description: Fast-talking Latino con artist Pestario "Pest" Vargas is the target of Scottish mobsters to whom he owes a considerable debt. Willing to do anything to raise money and avoid severe injury or death, Vargas agrees to a very unusual job -- he will be transported to a remote island and hunted by Gustav Shank, a racist German executive. If he can survive a full day and night, Vargas gets $50,000 and will be set free. Is he wily enough to elude Shank?

title: The Phantom
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Expedition Adventures

details.title: The Phantom
details.description: Two expeditions are trying to reach the Lost City of Zoloz -- one headed by Professor Davidson, a scientist who wants to establish an archaeological site, and the other by a greedy treasure hunter who wants to keep the fabled treasures of the city for himself. An agent of a foreign power also wants to establish a secret airbase there, so he stirs up the natives against The Phantom, who has been able to get them to stay peaceful so far. When The Phantom is murdered, his son takes his place and sets out to restore peace to the jungle and stop the agents' and the treasure hunters' nefarious plans.

title: The Philadelphia Story
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > Turbulent Liaisons

details.title: The Philadelphia Story
details.description: When a rich woman's ex-husband and a tabloid-type reporter turn up just before her planned remarriage, she begins to learn the truth about herself.

title: The Piano
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Romances

details.title: The Piano
details.description: When an arranged marriage brings Ada and her spirited daughter to the wilderness of nineteenth-century New Zealand, she finds herself locked in a battle of wills with both her controlling husband and a rugged frontiersman to whom she develops a forbidden attraction.

title: The Pillow Book
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Erotic Thrillers > Toxic Obsessions > Dark Fixations > Obsessive Fixations

details.title: The Pillow Book
details.description: A woman with a body writing fetish seeks to find a combined lover and calligrapher.

title: The Pompatus of Love
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Romantic Satires

details.title: The Pompatus of Love
details.description: Four guys sit around drinking beer and talking, trying to figure out the meaning of "the pompatus of love" (from the Steve Miller song "Joker") and analyzing their relationships with women.

title: The Portrait of a Lady
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Social Satires

details.title: The Portrait of a Lady
details.description: Ms. Isabel Archer isn't afraid to challenge societal norms. Impressed by her free spirit, her kindhearted cousin writes her into his fatally ill father's will. Suddenly rich and independent, Isabelle ventures into the world, along the way befriending a cynical intellectual and romancing an art enthusiast. However, the advantage of her affluence is called into question when she realizes the extent to which her money colors her relationships.

title: The Postman
full_path: Science, Space & Futuristic Frontiers > Sci-Fi, Action & Dystopian > Dystopian Futures

details.title: The Postman
details.description: In 2013, there are no highways, no I-ways, no dreams of a better tomorrow, only scattered survivors across what was once the United States. Into this apocalyptic wasteland comes an enigmatic drifter with a mule, a knack for Shakespeare, and something yet undiscovered: the power to inspire hope.

title: The Preacher's Wife
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Angel Comedies

details.title: The Preacher's Wife
details.description: Good-natured Reverend Henry Biggs finds that his marriage to choir mistress Julia is flagging, due to his constant absence caring for the deprived neighborhood they live in. On top of all this, his church is coming under threat from property developer Joe Hamilton. In desperation, Biggs prays to God for help – which arrives in the form of an angel named Dudley.

title: The Princess Bride
full_path: Heroic Quests & Legendary Adventures > Action, Adventure & Swashbuckler > Swashbuckling Adventures

details.title: The Princess Bride
details.description: In this enchantingly cracked fairy tale, the beautiful Princess Buttercup and the dashing Westley must overcome staggering odds to find happiness amid six-fingered swordsmen, murderous princes, Sicilians and rodents of unusual size. But even death can't stop these true lovebirds from triumphing.

title: The Professional
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Desperate Pursuits

details.title: The Professional
details.description: An insignificant little middle-aged man strikes a heinous bargain with an underworld expert. The man has a problem: his wife. A professional killer would seem to be the answer.

title: The Program
full_path: Reality, Documentary & Social Commentary > Biography, History & Documentary > Investigative Documentaries

details.title: The Program
details.description: An Irish sports journalist becomes convinced that Lance Armstrong's performances during the Tour de France victories are fueled by banned substances. With this conviction, he starts hunting for evidence that will expose Armstrong.

title: The Promise, The (Versprechen,
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Unconventional Upbringings

details.title: The Promise, The (Versprechen,
details.description: An iron-willed Georgia boy accepts the burden of a man on his young shoulders. Fifteen-year-old Terry O'Kelly is fatherless and his remaining parent, his mother, is dying. Anguished, the soon-to-be orphan makes a surprising grown-up decision: Terry promises to care for his six brothers and vows to keep the family together. Steadfast to his word, Terry takes on the struggles of parenthood, which yields some difficult and unpleasant surprises.

title: The Prophecy
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: The Prophecy
details.description: The angel Gabriel comes to Earth to collect a soul which will end the stalemated war in Heaven, and only a former priest and a little girl can stop him.

title: The Prophecy II
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Supernatural Horror Films

details.title: The Prophecy II
details.description: The archangel Gabriel returns to try to destroy the human race he despises so much, with the help of a suicidal teen and the opposition of the angel Danyael.

title: The Quest
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: The Quest
details.description: Ghang-gheng, the ancient winner-take-all competition in which the deadliest fighters from around the world employ the most spectacular feats of martial arts skills ever displayed in order to win the prized Golden Dragon. But fighting prowess alone will not be enough for Chris to triumph over such daunting foes.

title: The Quick and the Dead
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Western Action & Comedy > Gunslinger Westerns

details.title: The Quick and the Dead
details.description: A mysterious woman comes to compete in a quick-draw elimination tournament, in a town taken over by a notorious gunman.

title: The Quiet Man
full_path: Comedy, Adventure & Cultural Odyssey > Comedy & Adventure Films > Fish Out Of Water Comedies > Cultural Transplants

details.title: The Quiet Man
details.description: An American man returns to the village of his birth in Ireland, where he finds love and conflict.

title: The Quiet Room
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Action Thrillers

details.title: The Quiet Room
details.description: When Michael attempts suicide and doesn’t leave a note, he inadvertently awakens Hattie, a demon that haunts the psychiatric hospital he's in. Now he must find a way to stop her rampage before she kills everyone he connects with.

title: The Rainmaker
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Sports Drama & Coming-Of-Age > Underdog Sports Dramas

details.title: The Rainmaker
details.description: Fresh out of law school and desperate for work, idealistic rookie Rudy Baylor takes on a powerful insurance company accused of denying a dying boy’s claim. Teaming up with a scrappy, unlicensed paralegal, he finds himself in a David-versus-Goliath courtroom battle that tests his ethics, courage, and belief in justice.

title: The Ref
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Comedy, Crime & Sci-Fi > Crime Comedies > Hostage Capers

details.title: The Ref
details.description: A cat burglar is forced to take a bickering, dysfunctional family hostage on Christmas Eve.

title: The Relic
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Murder Investigations

details.title: The Relic
details.description: A homicide detective teams up with an evolutionary biologist to hunt a giant creature that is killing people in a Chicago museum.

title: The Reluctant Debutante
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Comedy, Coming-Of-Age & Romance > Coming-Of-Age Romances

details.title: The Reluctant Debutante
details.description: While visiting her father, an American teenage girl is thrown into London society during its final "Debutante Season."

title: The Remains of the Day
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Victorian Romances > Turbulent Liaisons

details.title: The Remains of the Day
details.description: A rule-bound head butler's world of manners and decorum in the household he maintains is tested by the arrival of a housekeeper who falls in love with him in post-WWI Britain. The possibility of romance and his master's cultivation of ties with the Nazi cause challenge his carefully maintained veneer of servitude.

title: The Replacement Killers
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Assassination Thrillers

details.title: The Replacement Killers
details.description: Hired assassin John Lee is asked by Chinatown crime boss Terence Wei to murder the young son of policeman Stan Zedkov. Lee has the boy in his sights, but his conscience gets the better of him, and he spares the child's life. Afraid that Wei will take revenge on his family in China, Lee seeks out expert forger Meg Coburn to obtain the passport he needs to get out of the country, but a band of replacement killers is soon on his trail.

title: The Return of Martin Guerre, The (Retour de Martin Guerre
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Deceptive Liaisons

details.title: The Return of Martin Guerre, The (Retour de Martin Guerre
details.description: Village of Artigat, southern France, summer 1542, during the reign of Francis I. Martin Guerre and Bertrande de Rols marry. A few years later, accused of having committed a robbery, Martin suddenly disappears. When, almost a decade later, a man arrives in Artigat claiming to be Martin, the Guerre family recognizes him as such; but doubts soon arise about his true identity.

title: The Return of the Pink Panther
full_path: Comedy, Satire & Romantic Escapades > Comedy, Dark Comedy & Satire > Comedy Capers

details.title: The Return of the Pink Panther
details.description: The famous Pink Panther jewel has once again been stolen and Inspector Clouseau is called in to catch the thief. The Inspector is convinced that 'The Phantom' has returned and utilises all of his resources – himself and his Asian manservant – to reveal the identity of 'The Phantom'.

title: The Rich Man's Wife
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Betrayals & Deceptions

details.title: The Rich Man's Wife
details.description: A rich man's wife finds she has a bad prenuptial agreement with an even worse husband. Over drinks with a stranger, she fantasizes about doing her husband in to void the prenup — but much to her surprise, the stranger decides to turn her imagination into reality.

title: The Right Stuff
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Biographical Dramas & Music Biopics > Biographical Dramas > Historical Figures > War Heroes & Legends

details.title: The Right Stuff
details.description: At the dawn of the Space Race, seven test pilots set out to become the first American astronauts to enter space. However, the road to making history brings momentous challenges.

title: The River Wild
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: The River Wild
details.description: Gail and Tom Hartman are struggling to stay together and decide to take a white-water rafting holiday adventure in Montana for their son Roarke's 10th birthday, only to meet up with a pair of mysterious men whose desperation grows, turning their vacation into a nightmare.

title: The Road to Wellville
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Satire, Comedy & Social Commentary > Satirical Dramas

details.title: The Road to Wellville
details.description: An unhappy young couple visit the infamous Kellogg spa in Battle Creek, Michigan while a young hustler tries get into the breakfast-cereal business and compete against John Kellogg's corn flakes.

title: The Rock
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Hostage Thrillers

details.title: The Rock
details.description: When vengeful General Francis X. Hummel seizes control of Alcatraz Island and threatens to launch missiles loaded with deadly chemical weapons into San Francisco, only a young FBI chemical weapons expert and notorious Federal prisoner have the skills to penetrate the impregnable island fortress and take him down.

title: The Ruling Class
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, Family & Mortality > Dysfunctional Family Dramas

details.title: The Ruling Class
details.description: When the Earl of Gurney dies in a cross-dressing accident, his schizophrenic son, Jack, inherits the Gurney estate. Jack is not the average nobleman; he sings and dances across the estate and thinks he is Jesus reincarnated. Believing that Jack is mentally unfit to own the estate, the Gurney family plots to steal Jack's inheritance. As their outrageous schemes fail, the family strives to cure Jack of his bizarre behavior, with disastrous results.

title: The Saint
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Action Thrillers

details.title: The Saint
details.description: International master thief, Simon Templar, also known as The Saint, is asked by a desperate rich man to find his kidnapped daughter. However, in addition to evading the authorities, Simon must face a dangerous adversary from his past.

title: The Saint of Fort Washington
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Family Dramas

details.title: The Saint of Fort Washington
details.description: Matthew, a young schizophrenic, finds himself out on the street when a slumlord tears down his apartment building. Soon, he finds himself in even more dire straits, when he is threatened by Little Leroy, a thug who is one of the tough denizens of the Fort Washington Shelter for Men. He reaches out to Jerry, a streetwise combat veteran, who takes Matthew under his wing as a son. The relationship between these two men grows as they attempt to conquer the numbing isolation of homelessness.

title: The Santa Clause
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Teenage Escapades

details.title: The Santa Clause
details.description: On Christmas Eve, divorced dad Scott Calvin and his son discover Santa Claus has fallen off their roof. When Scott takes the reins of the magical sleigh, he finds he is now the new Santa, and must convince a world of disbelievers, including himself.

title: The Scarlet Letter
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Historical, Drama & Romance > Period Dramas > Royal Courtships

details.title: The Scarlet Letter
details.description: Set in puritanical Boston in the mid 1600s, the story of seamstress Hester Prynne, who is outcast after she becomes pregnant by a respected reverend. She refuses to divulge the name of the father, is "convicted" of adultery and forced to wear a scarlet "A" until an Indian attack unites the Puritans and leads to a reevaluation of their laws and morals.

title: The Scout
full_path: Darkness, Fear & Human Conflict > Horror & Teen Thrillers > Teen Slasher Films

details.title: The Scout
details.description: An independent film crew on a group location scout are attacked by a mysterious masked killer, who appears "hell-bent" on murdering them one by one.

title: The Second Jungle Book: Mowgli & Baloo
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Orphaned Odysseys

details.title: The Second Jungle Book: Mowgli & Baloo
details.description: In this exciting live-action adventure, young Mowgli, an orphan raised by wolves, is spotted by a scout for a giant circus. Accompanied by a cruel hunter and a snake charmer, the scout sets out to trap Mowgli. But with the help of Baloo the bear and Bagheera the panther, little Mowgli leads the adults into his biggest and wildest adventure yet! A fun-filled movie every member of the family will enjoy.

title: The Secret Adventures of Tom Thumb
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Secret Adventures of Tom Thumb
details.description: A boy born the size of a small doll is kidnapped by a genetic lab and must find a way back to his father in this inventive adventure filmed using stop motion animation techniques.

title: The Secret Garden
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Coming-Of-Age Dramas > Transitioning Adolescents > Unconventional Upbringings

details.title: The Secret Garden
details.description: A young British girl born and reared in India loses her neglectful parents in an earthquake. She is returned to England to live at her uncle's castle. Her uncle is very distant due to the loss of his wife ten years before. Neglected once again, she begins exploring the estate and discovers a garden that has been locked and forgotten. Aided by one of the servants' boys, she begins restoring the garden, and eventually discovers some other secrets of the manor.

title: The Secret of Roan Inish
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Secret of Roan Inish
details.description: Ten-year-old Fiona is sent to live with her grandparents in a small fishing village in Donegal, Ireland. She soon learns the local legend that an ancestor of hers married a Selkie – a seal who can turn into a human. Years earlier, her baby brother was washed out to sea and never seen again, so when Fiona spies a naked little boy on the abandoned Isle of Roan Inish, she is compelled to investigate.

title: The Seventh Seal, The (Sjunde inseglet,
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Redemption Dramas > Haunted Past Redeemers

details.title: The Seventh Seal, The (Sjunde inseglet,
details.description: When disillusioned Swedish knight Antonius Block returns home from the Crusades to find his country in the grips of the Black Death, he challenges Death to a chess match for his life. Tormented by the belief that God does not exist, Block sets off on a journey, meeting up with traveling players Jof and his wife, Mia, and becoming determined to evade Death long enough to commit one redemptive act while he still lives.

title: The Shadow
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Action, Comedy & Adventure > Macau Thrillers

details.title: The Shadow
details.description: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

title: The Shaggy Dog
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Wacky Family Misadventures

details.title: The Shaggy Dog
details.description: The tale of a workaholic dad-turned-dog who finds that being man's best friend shows him the most important job - being a great dad.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Uplifting Dramedies

details.title: The Shawshank Redemption
details.description: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, Dufresne comes to be admired by the other inmates -- including an older prisoner named Red -- for his integrity and unquenchable sense of hope.

title: The Shining
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Haunted Houses

details.title: The Shining
details.description: Jack Torrance accepts a caretaker job at the Overlook Hotel, where he, along with his wife Wendy and their son Danny, must live isolated from the rest of the world for the winter. But they aren't prepared for the madness that lurks within.

title: The Shooter
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Assassination Thrillers

details.title: The Shooter
details.description: A CIA agent gets caught up in political intrigue after he gets brought in to solve the murder of a Cuban ambassador.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Serial Killer Thrillers

details.title: The Silence of the Lambs
details.description: Clarice Starling is a top student at the FBI's training academy.  Jack Crawford wants Clarice to interview Dr. Hannibal Lecter, a brilliant psychiatrist who is also a violent psychopath, serving life behind bars for various acts of murder and cannibalism.  Crawford believes that Lecter may have insight into a case and that Starling, as an attractive young woman, may be just the bait to draw him out.

title: The Sixth Man
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Sports Drama & Coming-Of-Age > Underdog Sports Dramas

details.title: The Sixth Man
details.description: A college athlete returns from the dead to help his brother's basketball team win the NCAA title.

title: The Sound of Music
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Classic Comedies

details.title: The Sound of Music
details.description: In the years before World War II, a tomboyish postulant at an Austrian abbey is hired as a governess in the home of a widowed naval captain with seven children, and brings a new love of life and music into the home.

title: The Spanish Prisoner
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Corporate Thrillers

details.title: The Spanish Prisoner
details.description: An inventor of a secret process suddenly finds himself alone as both his friends and the corporation he works for turn against him.

title: The Specialist
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Cat-And-Mouse Thrillers

details.title: The Specialist
details.description: May Munro is a woman obsessed with getting revenge on the people who murdered her parents when she was still a girl. She hires Ray Quick, a retired explosives expert, to kill her parents' killers. When Ned Trent, embittered ex-partner of Quick's, is assigned to protect one of Quick's potential victims, a deadly game of cat and mouse ensues.

title: The Spitfire Grill
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Small Town Dramas > Quirky Communities

details.title: The Spitfire Grill
details.description: Percy, upon being released from prison, goes to the small town of Gillead, to find a place where she can start over again. She is taken in by Hannah, to help out at her place, the Spitfire Grill. Percy brings change to the small town, stirring resentment and fear in some, and growth in others.

title: The Star Maker, The (Uomo delle stelle
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > European Escapades

details.title: The Star Maker, The (Uomo delle stelle
details.description: The adventures and deceptions of a photographer who travels through small villages of 1950s Sicily pretending to work for the big film studios in Rome.

title: The Stars Fell on Henrietta
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Drama, Family & Adventure > Small Town Dramas > Quirky Communities

details.title: The Stars Fell on Henrietta
details.description: The setting is early America during the oil boom. An elderly, down on his luck 'oil man', Mr. Cox finds himself in the town of Henrietta. Using unconventional methods, he convinces himself and local Don Day that there is oil on Day's land. The financially strapped Day puts everything into finding oil...but at what cost?

title: The Sting
full_path: Comedy, Satire & Romantic Escapades > Comedy, Dark Comedy & Satire > Comedy Capers

details.title: The Sting
details.description: A novice con man teams up with an acknowledged master to avenge the murder of a mutual friend by pulling off the ultimate big con and swindling a fortune from a big-time mobster.

title: The Stranger
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Action Thrillers

details.title: The Stranger
details.description: The Stranger is a man with no name, no memory and absolutely nothing left to lose. But when he finds himself hunted by both the FBI and the Russian mob, this amnesiac decides to fight back. Pursuit cannot stop him. Torture will not break him. And with every beating, bullet and betrayal, he’ll remember another piece of the horror that took away his career, his family and his identity.

title: The Stupids
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Slapstick Escapades

details.title: The Stupids
details.description: An incredibly dull-witted family unknowingly stumble upon an illegal weapons deal while on the trail of their "stolen" garbage.

title: The Substance of Fire
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Redemption Dramas > Haunted Past Redeemers

details.title: The Substance of Fire
details.description: Isaac Geldhart is a Holocaust survivor who, overcome by grief at the recent death of his wife, seems determined to run his publishing firm into the ground by printing books that have no hope of financial success. His son Aaron, who also works at the company, grows frustrated with Isaac's emotional decline and attempts to take over the firm. The resulting crisis involves Isaac's other two children, his daughter Sarah and his dying son Martin.

title: The Substitute
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Crime Thrillers > Corrupt Authorities

details.title: The Substitute
details.description: When an inner-city Miami schoolteacher gets her knee broken after standing up to the school's gang leader, her mercenary combat specialist boyfriend goes undercover as a substitute teacher to take down the punk. Soon he discovers a conspiracy of criminals at work, and must reassemble his team from his last jungle raid to stop them.

title: The Sum of Us
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Lgbtq+ Comedy Romances & Relationships > Queer Romances

details.title: The Sum of Us
details.description: A widowed father has to deal with two complex issues: while he is searching for "Miss Right," his son, who is in his 20s and gay, is searching for "Mr. Right."

title: The Sunchaser
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Redemption Dramas > Haunted Past Redeemers

details.title: The Sunchaser
details.description: A young half-Navajo convict dying of cancer forces a yuppie doctor to drive him to a magic healing lake.

title: The Swan Princess
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Swan Princess
details.description: The beautiful princess Odette is transformed into a swan by an evil sorcerer's spell. Held captive at an enchanted lake, she befriends Jean-Bob the frog, Speed the turtle and Puffin the bird. Despite their struggle to keep the princess safe, these good-natured creatures can do nothing about the sorcerer's spell, which can only be broken by a vow of everlasting love.

title: The Sweet Hereafter
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Crime & Romance > Redemption Dramas > Haunted Past Redeemers

details.title: The Sweet Hereafter
details.description: A small mountain community in Canada is devastated when a school bus accident leaves more than a dozen of its children dead. A big-city lawyer arrives to help the survivors' and victims' families prepare a class-action suit, but his efforts only seem to push the townspeople further apart. At the same time, one teenage survivor of the accident has to reckon with the loss of innocence brought about by a different kind of damage.

title: The Sword in the Stone
full_path: Growth, Identity & Social Odyssey > Wilderness Adventure & Family Fantasy > Family Fantasies > Whimsical Realms

details.title: The Sword in the Stone
details.description: Wart is a young boy who aspires to be a knight's squire. On a hunting trip he falls in on Merlin, a powerful but amnesiac wizard who has plans for him beyond mere squiredom. He starts by trying to give him an education, believing that once one has an education, one can go anywhere. Needless to say, it doesn't quite work out that way.

title: The Tango Lesson
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Lgbtq+ Comedy Romances & Relationships > Queer Romances

details.title: The Tango Lesson
details.description: On a trip to Paris Sally meets Pablo, a tango dancer. He starts teaching her to dance then she returns to London to work on some "projects". She visits Buenos Aires and learns more from Pablo's friends. Sally and Pablo meet again but this time their relationship changes, she realises they want different things from each other. On a trip to Buenos Aires they cement their friendship.

title: The Terminator
full_path: Science, Space & Futuristic Frontiers > Sci-Fi, Action & Dystopian > Dystopian Futures

details.title: The Terminator
details.description: In the post-apocalyptic future, reigning tyrannical supercomputers teleport a cyborg assassin known as the "Terminator" back to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor, whose unborn son is destined to lead insurgents against 21st century mechanical hegemony. Meanwhile, the human-resistance movement dispatches a lone warrior to safeguard Sarah. Can he stop the virtually indestructible killing machine?

title: The Thin Blue Line
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: The Thin Blue Line
details.description: The work of the US police force and the problem of fighting rising crime across the country.

title: The Thin Man
full_path: Comedy, Satire & Romantic Escapades > Comedy & Romance Classics > Screwball Comedies

details.title: The Thin Man
details.description: A husband and wife detective team takes on the search for a missing inventor and almost get killed for their efforts.

title: The Third Man
full_path: Timeless Tales & Epic Sagas > Crime & Gangster Films > Film Noirs

details.title: The Third Man
details.description: In postwar Vienna, Austria, Holly Martins, a writer of pulp Westerns, arrives penniless as a guest of his childhood chum Harry Lime, only to learn he has died. Martins develops a conspiracy theory after learning of a "third man" present at the time of Harry's death, running into interference from British officer Major Calloway, and falling head-over-heels for Harry's grief-stricken lover, Anna.

title: The Three Caballeros
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Fantasy, Comedy & Classic > Fantasy Classics

details.title: The Three Caballeros
details.description: For Donald's birthday he receives a box with three gifts inside. The gifts, a movie projector, a pop-up book, and a pinata, each take Donald on wild adventures through Mexico and South America.

title: The Three Musketeers
full_path: Heroic Quests & Legendary Adventures > Historical Adventure & Swashbuckler Films > Musketeer Films

details.title: The Three Musketeers
details.description: The hot-headed young D'Artagnan along with three former legendary but now down on their luck Musketeers must unite and defeat a beautiful double agent and her villainous employer from seizing the French throne and engulfing Europe in war.

title: The Tie That Binds
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Psychological Thrillers > Murder Investigations

details.title: The Tie That Binds
details.description: A young couple adopts a traumatized child, unaware that her parents are fugitives and murderers who will do anything to get her back.

title: The Tin Drum, The (Blechtrommel,
full_path: Reality, Documentary & Social Commentary > Documentary & Film History > Making-Of Documentaries

details.title: The Tin Drum, The (Blechtrommel,
details.description: A  documentary-montage of sketches, photos, storyboards, and film excerpts that is accompanied by Volker Schlöndorff's thoughts about his 1979 film THE TIN DRUM.

title: The Transformers: The Movie
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Space Operas

details.title: The Transformers: The Movie
details.description: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Adventure, Fantasy & Science Fiction > Expedition Adventures

details.title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
details.description: Two jobless Americans convince a prospector to travel to the mountains of Mexico with them in search of gold. But the hostile wilderness, local bandits, and greed all get in the way of their journey.

title: The Trigger Effect
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: The Trigger Effect
details.description: A blackout leaves those affected to consider what is necessary, what is legal, and what is questionable, in order to survive in a predatory environment.

title: The Truman Show
full_path: Humor, Storytelling & Social Reflection > Drama, War & Social Thrillers > Social Commentaries

details.title: The Truman Show
details.description: An insurance salesman begins to suspect that his whole life is actually some sort of reality TV show.

title: The Truth About Cats & Dogs
full_path: Love, Comedy & Human Connection > Comedy, Romance & Drama > Romantic Comedies > Fateful Encounters

details.title: The Truth About Cats & Dogs
details.description: A successful veterinarian and radio show host with low self-esteem asks her model friend to impersonate her when a handsome man wants to see her.

title: The Turning
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Haunted Houses

details.title: The Turning
details.description: A young woman quits her teaching job to become a private tutor and governess for two wealthy young kids, but soon starts to suspect there’s more to their house than meets the eye.

title: The Umbrellas of Cherbourg, The (Parapluies de Cherbourg,
full_path: Reality, Documentary & Social Commentary > Documentary & Film History > Making-Of Documentaries

details.title: The Umbrellas of Cherbourg, The (Parapluies de Cherbourg,
details.description: Television documentary about the making of Jacques Demy's 1964 film "The Umbrellas of Cherbourg".

title: The Unbearable Lightness of Being
full_path: Drama, Romance & Human Experience > Drama, Romance & Crime > Infidelity Dramas > Marital Crises

details.title: The Unbearable Lightness of Being
details.description: Successful surgeon Tomas leaves Prague for an operation, meets a young photographer named Tereza, and brings her back with him. Tereza is surprised to learn that Tomas is already having an affair with the bohemian Sabina, but when the Soviet invasion occurs, all three flee to Switzerland. Sabina begins an affair, Tom continues womanizing, and Tereza, disgusted, returns to Czechoslovakia. Realizing his mistake, Tomas decides to chase after her.

title: The Usual Suspects
full_path: Action, Suspense & Speculative Entertainment > Crime, Thriller & Action > Identity Thrillers

details.title: The Usual Suspects
details.description: Held in an L.A. interrogation room, Verbal Kint attempts to convince the feds that a mythic crime lord, Keyser Soze, not only exists, but was also responsible for drawing him and his four partners into a multi-million dollar heist that ended with an explosion in San Pedro harbor – leaving few survivors. Verbal lures his interrogators with an incredible story of the crime lord's almost supernatural prowess.

title: The Van
full_path: Imagination, Adventure & Enchanted Realms > Family Comedy & Adventure > Family Comedies > Teenage Escapades

details.title: The Van
details.description: Bobby blows all his college savings on a van and tries to get the girl of his dreams. It's a wild time with Bobby and his friends.

title: The Visitors, The (Visiteurs,
full_path: Darkness, Fear & Human Conflict > War, Drama & Thriller > Vietnam War Dramas

details.title: The Visitors, The (Visiteurs,
details.description: Bill, Martha and their little child Hal are spending a quiet winter Sunday in their cosy house when they get an unexpected visit from Mike Nickerson and Tony Rodriguez. Mike and Tony are old acquaintances of Bill; a few years back, in Vietnam, they were in the same platoon. They also became opposed parties in a court martial - for a reason that Bill never explained to Martha. What happened in Vietnam, and what is the reason for the presence of Mike and Tony ?

title: The Walking Dead
full_path: Darkness, Myth & Paranormal Realms > Horror, Supernatural & Thriller > Monster Movies

details.title: The Walking Dead
details.description: Down-on-his-luck John Ellman is framed for a judge's murder. After he's convicted and sentenced to death, witnesses come forth and prove his innocence. But it was too late for a stay to be granted and Ellman is executed. A doctor uses an experimental procedure to restore him to life, though the full outcome is other than expected.

title: The War
